70050000045574.description: Clue - Neon Noir includes a Location, 6 Suspects, 4 Customisation Items, and 6 Tokens to unlock!
70050000045574.name: Clue - Neon Noir

70010000110896.description:
Experience the Ultimate Competitive Multiplayer Racing Game!

Welcome to Car Guys, an exciting multiplayer racing game where skill 
and strategy come together in fast-paced, action-packed competitions. 
Represent your nation and climb the global leaderboard in adrenaline-fueled 
races that will put your reflexes and driving skills to the test!

Features:

- Real-Time Multiplayer
- Race against players from around the world in thrilling, high-speed 
  competitions.
- Enjoy a seamless and lag-free online experience.

- Compete for Your Nation
- Choose your country and contribute to its position on the global 
  leaderboard.
- Prove which nation dominates the track and rise to the top.

- Action-Packed Racing
- Pick up power-ups like missiles and shields to outmaneuver your rivals.
- Master both offensive and defensive driving strategies to claim victory.

- Vibrant Visuals
- Experience colorful graphics and dynamic environments that bring 
  each track to life.
- Smooth gameplay that keeps the action fluid from start to finish.

- Extensive Customization
- Personalize your vehicles with unique skins, decals, and upgrades.
- Choose from sleek sports cars to rugged off-road machines—the 
  possibilities are endless!

- Competitive Events
- Participate in daily and weekly championships with unique challenges 
  and rotating game modes.
- Test your skills and earn exclusive rewards.

- Progression & Meta-Game
- Unlock new tracks, vehicles, and upgrades as you progress.
- Use in-game currency earned from races to enhance your car's performance.
70010000110896.intro: Experience the thrill of Car Guys, a high-octane multiplayer racing game! Represent your nation, compete in explosive races, and climb the global leaderboard.
70010000110896.name: Car Guys

70010000121057.description:
Build your own automotive empire in Auto Shop Simulator — the ultimate business simulation where every deal counts. Step into the role of a car dealership owner and transform a small local garage into a thriving vehicle marketplace. Buy used and premium cars, negotiate profitable deals, manage your inventory, and satisfy customers looking for their perfect ride.

Start with a modest showroom and gradually expand your business by unlocking new vehicles, upgrading facilities, and attracting more buyers. From economy cars to luxury models, every purchase and sale influences your reputation and success. Manage finances carefully, react to changing market trends, and make strategic decisions to grow your dealership into the top auto shop in town.

Features:
	•	Buy and Sell Vehicles: Discover valuable cars, negotiate prices, and sell vehicles for maximum profit.
	•	Realistic Dealership Management: Organize inventory, monitor market value, and keep your showroom stocked with popular models.
	•	Expand Your Business: Upgrade your dealership, unlock larger spaces, and improve customer experience.
	•	Dynamic Customer System: Meet different customer needs and handle daily business challenges.
	•	Immersive Simulation Experience: Enjoy detailed vehicles, dealership customization, and rewarding progression.

Auto Shop Simulator delivers an engaging experience for car lovers and simulation fans alike. Test your entrepreneurial skills, make smart business decisions, and grow your small dealership into a successful automotive empire.
70010000121057.intro: Ready to become the ultimate car tycoon?
70010000121057.name: Auto Shop Simulator

70010000123229.description:
The Coma 3: Bloodlines is a 2D run-and-hide horror adventure where you must escape threatening puppets and shadow monsters while gathering clues, solving problems, and unraveling the mystery surrounding the chaos that the three main characters have been thrust into.

The game maintains a constant sense of suspense and tension, allowing players to experience the unique culture and lifestyle of South Korea, while uncovering its distinctive sorcery, curses, history, and style.



STORY

In a district of Seoul, South Korea, there was a school boasting a long history and tradition, known as ‘Sehwa Private High School’. Behind the scenes, people seeking to study the cursed underworld of history were exploring and managing this place under the name ‘Sehwa Foundation’, with their focus on the nightmare dimension, the mirror world of this reality: The Coma.

 However, there were also those who viewed this place as an object of exploration and suppressed the dangerous elements. They are the Ghost Vigilantes. The wraiths of the past, who have traversed the ages to this time period, appear...and the once-quiet Coma dimension has once again become a realm of nightmare.



KEY FEATURES

Welcome to the Coma World: In this realm of shadows, where rumors and urban legends become reality, all kinds of dangers lurk. If a living intruder dies here, their body will be severed from their spirit and never wake up again.

Exotic Region for The Mystery Horror: Experience a unique occult and mystery atmosphere in the special local area of South Korea. The mysteries and secrets that have continued since the previous work will stimulate your brain. Who should you trust, and who should you abandon?

Into New Locations: Leaving behind familiar schools and neighborhoods, you will embark on unpredictable adventures with new missions and locations. Will you struggle to survive on your own, or will someone save you from that fate?

Run and Hide: You cannot fight. The shadows are running amok, and hideous puppets will hunt you down. You must hide when you have the chance and wait for the right moment to make your move and escape.



NEW FEATURES

4 Bosses from the Cursed History: New, never-before-seen bosses are coming. They all have different attack patterns and require different approaches.

Compact area design: Run-and-Hide action in more enclosed, tight spaces.

3 playable characters: You can take turns playing as three different characters, each with different strengths and weaknesses, all of who will be familiar to fans of the series.

Closure of all previous games: This game concludes the story surrounding Sehwa High School that began in The Coma 1. Many secrets from the previous games are unravelled here, in the most intense entry of all.
70010000123229.intro: Follow the Bloodlines and break this curse.
70010000123229.name: The Coma 3: Bloodlines

70010000117941.description:
Whisper of the House is a cozy game about organizing and decorating. You'll take on various tasks from the townspeople—helping them move, organize, and clean their spaces. In the process, your gentle touch might make a difference in their lives, and perhaps uncover some hidden stories...

- Take on charming, quirky tasks: moving into new homes, tidying cluttered rooms, preparing new shops, sorting through treasured keepsakes… even tracking down cats!
- Piece together the smallest clues to uncover their unspoken memories, weaving a story where mystery and love intertwine.
- Decorate your own home freely! Over 2,000 pieces of furniture and more than 10 unique home layouts—every space is yours to design.
- Dozens of items also feature custom sound effects—tap the drums, snap a photo, run the tap. In this home, you don't just see it—you hear it.
- But beneath these warm, everyday moments, the town hides something. Perhaps the one destined to uncover the truth… is you.
70010000117941.intro: Help the townspeople move, organize, and clean, perhaps making a difference in their lives and uncovering some hidden stories...
70010000117941.name: Whisper of the House

70010000121204.description:
Feeling lucky? Step into the Grand Vegas Casino and try your hand at 4 of the most popular gambling games in the world, with no need to get dressed up or risk your wallet! Grand Vegas Casino is a casual gambling simulation game for players of all skill levels, offering intuitive controls and a fluidly animated HD-2D graphic style to keep you immersed in luxurious high-rolling action.

Build your strategy, improve your skills, place daring bets and experiment to win. Featured casino games include Poker, Roulette, Blackjack and Slots, each with unique mechanics and standard rules that have made them timeless staples of the gambling scene. Play against computer-controlled opponents and unlock cool rewards as you progress! Are you ready to go all in?

• Play Poker, Blackjack, Roulette and Slots using standard casino rules!
• Experiment, strategize and easily restart if you run out of money.
• Collect rewards for defeating AI opponents!
• Enjoy crisp and colorful HD presentation in fluidly animated 2D style.
70010000121204.intro: Become a gambling master without the financial risk as you test your skills in the world's most popular casino games!
70010000121204.name: Grand Vegas Casino

70010000096962.description:
Put your brain to the test with this slide-puzzler blending roguelite strategy, the satisfying feel of a match-3, and the freedom of a deck-builder!

In solo play, enjoy a focused experience and choose from a cast of unique characters!
Items available change each run. Adapt and advance from one stage to the next!

In online mode, compete with up to 8 players from around the world in lively multiplayer competition!
Chain those combos, and hype it up with your rivals!

After boss matches (yes there are those too!), "gruesome" fatalities await...!?
70010000096962.intro: An exciting roguelite puzzler where every playthrough is unique, now on Nintendo Switch™!
70010000096962.name: Dialoop -Roguelite Puzzle-

70010000100975.description:
#DRIVE Rally is an arcade-inspired rally racing game set in the golden racing era of the 1990s. Grab your co-driver and burn rubber in iconic, race-winning cars across varied rally stages and terrains in some of the most recognizable rallying locations in the world—perfect for fans of retro racing games and newcomers alike.

From the sunny landscapes of Dry Crumbs, through the whispering woods of Holzberg, to the chilly wilderness of Revontuli; take a journey through a diverse world you haven’t experienced in racing games before. Each destination delivers distinctive stage design and visual flair that celebrate classic ’90s rally vibes.

Jump behind the wheel of legendary rally cars, including Das Holzwagen, The Doggo, The Bobond, and many more. Build and customize your cars from the ground up to match your driving style and rally your way. Personalize the body, paintwork, and decals, then add that cherry on top with custom decorations - create a ride that feels truly your own.

Don’t forget the co-driver! Your co-driver can be your biggest cheerleader and toughest judge. It’s a partnership that thrives on performance and emotion. Their goal is to assist your runs with helpful navigation and tips to improve your stage times - making every run feel dynamic and replayable.

Features
• The spirit of ’90s rally for players of all ages and generations

• Exciting driving mechanics, simple to start but demanding in depth

• Stunning rally tracks and locations inspired by the world

• Retro-inspired cars with awesome personalization and car customization options

• Compete on online leaderboards to be the best and prove your rally skills
70010000100975.intro: Put your foot down and redefine speed in #DRIVE Rally!
70010000100975.name: #DRIVE Rally

70010000104583.description:
From the hidden pages of Jurnal Risa comes a visual novel where the boundary between the living and the unseen begins to blur. Step into Jurnal Risa's world where each shadow holds a story, and every whisper leads you deeper into the unknown.

Witness the resurrection of the foretold nemesis of the Jurnal Risa crew, which was never revealed before. Unveil its dark destiny within this horror-adventure game.

This is the tale of Jurnal Risa, as recounted to me by Risa herself.

Key features

• A Paranormal Adventure Mystery

Jurnal Risa is known for exploring haunted places and sharing true ghost stories from Indonesia. Their adventures, bonds, and spiritual encounters inspire the game’s mystery and emotional depth.

• Brought to Life with Full Voice Acting

Fully voiced by the real members of the group, each scene feels authentic as it captures their unique personalities, real-life bonds, and the emotional weight behind every supernatural encounter.

• Mini games

Take a break from the tension with fun mini-games.

• Collect the Fragments of the Past

Gather collectible photos as you complete stories and challenges. Each photo unlocks a memory or reveals a hidden piece of the mystery.


Ready to turn the last page and face what lingers beyond?
70010000104583.intro: Witness the resurrection of the foretold nemesis of the Jurnal Risa family, which was never revealed before. Unveil its dark destiny within this horror-adventure game.
70010000104583.name: Jurnal Risa: Dark Destiny

70010000110884.description:
Battle enemy forces reminiscent of alien weapons from retro sci-fi works in this single-player 2.5D FPS.

■STORY
One day, a gargantuan alien spaceship invades and unleashes countless combat weapons upon Earth, demolishing human civilization in the blink of an eye. Although humans succeeded in developing special weapons that could deal an effective blow to the aliens, it was too late to revive their civilization.

To this day, however, the Earth has yet to fall silent despite its abandoned cities, for swarm weapons known as "CogrinaUnits," 12-meter-tall autonomous humanoid units, collect and operate the limited number of special weapons that remain, and continue to fight against the aliens, all for the sake of accomplishing the mission humanity entrusted them with....

■Simple yet varied missions with a wide range of fighting styles
・Choose whether to take down the multi-legged robot weapons ravaging the city by leveraging the terrain, or to move in close and finish them off.

・The next unit is sent out immediately once you are defeated.

・Only a limited amount of equipment remains, so you'll need to recover items from defeated units to continue the battle.

■A story of hope told between battles
・Find out what comes of the battle against the overwhelming enemy forces

・Light-hearted conversation scenes with fellow units during intermissions

・Plus a shiba inu!
70010000110884.intro: Even after all has ended, We continue to fight to accomplish the mission humanity entrusted us with.
70010000110884.name: The Last Salvage Squad

70010000113389.description:
The sprawling Nezu-Me space station has been overrun with devious, mutated mice! Roll around the rails in a unique blend of platform game and 2D shooter. Blast enemies, dodge threats, destroy the Nezu-Me core and get all the stranded cats back home!

Super Scram Kitty is a complete re-imagining of 'Scram Kitty and his Buddy on Rails', with all new controls, remixed stages, updated enemy behaviours, and new visual effects.
70010000113389.intro: Stop the evil Nezu-Me corporation's plan for eternal domination!
70010000113389.name: Super Scram Kitty

70010000113432.description:
DUNGEON RAZE is an intense power-trip where you don't crawl through the dungeon, you blast through it. Become a destruction magic-wielding witch and reduce every wall and defense system to dust.

Demolish Everything in Sight
Not even the walls of the dungeon can stop you. Tear through the map to hunt down gold, power-ups, and rescue allies. Your firepower vaporizes the dungeon as you go

Experience Instant Hyper-Inflation
Forget grinding for gradual stat upgrades and go for explosive growth. Power scaling that defies logic is achievable within minutes. Watch your projectiles multiply, and your damage skyrocket until even the toughest walls satisfyingly crumble in a single shot.

Lead a Mobile Fortress
No one razes alone. Smash through the rubble to rescue imprisoned adventurers and add their firepower to your own. As your squad grows and your inflation peaks, the screen fills with a chaotic storm of magic and munitions that no defense can withstand.

Push Your Destructive Limits
Find out just how much devastation you can unleash:
- Eternal Dungeon: No limits, no end. See how far your "hyper-inflated" firepower can go in a procedurally generated maze of infinite destruction.
- Speed Raze: How fast can you raze the core? A time-based mode where every second counts.
- Hard Dungeon: High-difficulty stages filled with tougher walls and enemies, designed to challenge your ultimate power. Encounter special allies and powerful, unknown foes.
70010000113432.intro:
Demolish walls to grow stronger!
A high-octane, magic destruction shooter.
70010000113432.name: DUNGEON RAZE

70010000114355.description:
The emojis have ascended — and heaven is under attack.
In this chaotic rogue-like first-person shooter, you fight to defend sacred floating temples as waves of emojis invade from beyond the clouds.
Before each run, choose your modifiers: make the challenge brutal with Hard Mode, turn every enemy into a halo-wearing trickster, or enable Bouncy Mode to turn the battlefield into a storm of leaping chaos.
Then step into the sky arenas — floating temples, shattered bridges, and ancient ruins drifting above endless clouds. Each arena offers unique hazards like breakable floors, explosive relics, and narrow walkways where one wrong step means a long fall.
Armed with a simple pistol, you’ll face waves of emojis that rush, fly, shield, explode, and overwhelm. Destroy them to collect glowing orbs, level up, and choose powerful upgrades: boost your stats, gain perks, or spawn new weapons to shift the tide.
Every second becomes a balancing act between precision and survival. The further you hold out, the more aggressive and varied the emojis become — from bouncing kamikazes to floating sharpshooters raining fire from above.
Survive long enough, and you’ll unlock new arenas, modifiers, and more ways to embrace the madness of the skies.
70010000114355.intro: Fast-paced rogue-like FPS mayhem above the clouds!
70010000114355.name: Emoji Battlefield - Sky Massacre

70010000116720.description:
Choose your spaceship and defeat the alien threat coming from the Moon. Fight your way through by crushing, smashing, and blowing up hostile aliens that are taking control of powerful Earth weapons and military technology. Find the entity controlling the threat and make it explode in blood.

Space Dragons is a classic horizontal shoot ’em up game where you can choose different ships with unique characteristics and abilities to destroy tons of invading aliens. Throughout the adventure, you will face powerful bosses and explosive enemies. Get upgrades for your ship, weapons, and more to carve your way through the fleshy and bloody path that awaits you in Space Dragons.

Features:

Local multiplayer

11 fun and complete stages

A large arsenal of weapons awaits you in vast scenarios

Cumulative upgrades each time you finish a stage, allowing different combinations

11 epic and frantic boss encounters

Beautiful hand-drawn and animated pixel art characters and environments

Various enemies with different attacks and transformations

Execute enemies and bosses to gain upgrades and score points

Extremely frantic and explosive gameplay

Each boss has a transformation
70010000116720.intro: Choose your spaceship and defeat the alien threat from the Moon
70010000116720.name: Space Dragons

70010000119817.description: Learn to react quickly to unconventional situations. Maneuver your way through sneaky enemies and use your attacks to destroy planetary defenses.
70010000119817.intro: Fire up your blasters and smash through any planet's defenses!
70010000119817.name: Planet Divers

70010000120727.description:
Fairy Tale Fighters is a 2D fighting game.

Momotaro, Kintaro, Sun Wukong, Peter Pan, Pinocchio, Aladdin,
Puss in Boots, Red Hood, Alice, Rapunzel, Snow White,
Cinderella, the Witch, the Wolf, and many more fairy tale characters all gather in one place!

When your gauge fills up, you can unleash a powerful super special move!
Enjoy exciting battles in a magical fantasy world!
70010000120727.intro: A dream fighting game where characters from fairy tales and novels battle each other!
70010000120727.name: Fairy Tale Fighters

70010000121245.description:
Welcome to Enterprise Corp.
We are pleased to have you.

Your job is simple. You must press the button when the system instructs you to do so.

The system will evaluate your punctuality, consistency, and ability to follow instructions.
Good performance will result in promotions within the corporate hierarchy.
Poor performance will have immediate consequences.

There is no need to understand the internal workings of the processes.
All relevant information will be provided when appropriate.

The system does not make mistakes.
The system records every action.

Thank you for your interest in becoming part of Enterprise Corp.

In “Just. Press. The Button.”, every action counts and every decision defines you. Explore a world where obedience to rules is not optional and promotions come with increasing expectations. "Just. Press. The Button." places you face to face with routine and constant corporate pressure as you attempt to maintain your position within the hierarchy.

Prepare for a dystopian experience that blends the race for success, monotony, tension, and the consequences of every step, all while the system watches, evaluates, and records your every move.
70010000121245.name: Just. Press. The Button.

70010000121290.description:
The World Cup has been stolen by aliens and it's up to you to get it back! 

Soccer Kid is an innovative 2D platformer that challenges you to navigate the world using only your soccer skills. Instead of just running and jumping, you'll need to dribble, header, and kick your way through enemies and obstacles across the globe.

This QUByte Classics edition brings the ultimate nostalgic package to your Nintendo Switch™.
70010000121290.intro: A classic platformer where your soccer ball is your weapon!
70010000121290.name: Soccer Kid Collection (QUByte Classics)

70010000121657.description:
Tokyo never sleeps, and neither does she.

On stage, she's everything the crowd wants: radiant, untouchable, a star built from lights and choreography.
Off stage, she moves through a different world entirely, one with its own rules, its own silence, and its own kind of danger.

Tokyo Yakuza Idols: Save the Heart of a Rebel Girl is a narrative visual novel where romance and risk share the same heartbeat.
You didn't go looking for her.
But now that she's let you close, walking away isn't really an option anymore.

Each girl carries a story split between two lives: the performer the world sees and the woman hidden underneath the glamour and the shadows.

Ambition, loyalty, pain, rebellion. Every route pulls you deeper into who she really is.

Your choices determine whether she stays trapped between her worlds...
or finally finds someone worth choosing over all of it.


Features:

● DUAL LIVES, ONE HEART: Each character lives between the idol spotlight and the yakuza underworld, and both sides of her matter.

● IMPACTFUL CHOICES: Your decisions shape how far she trusts you, and how the story ends.

● EXCLUSIVE SCENES: Unlock intimate moments that reveal the truth behind the performance and the danger.

● MULTIPLE ENDINGS: Escape together, get pulled into her world, lose her to it, or change everything.

● WIN HER HEART IN 30 DAYS: You have one month to earn her heart. Every decision counts, every moment matters, and time waits for no one.


She built walls to survive.
Are you capable of conquering her heart?
70010000121657.intro:
She performs under spotlights. She rules in the shadows.
And somehow, she chose to let you in.
Can you handle both sides of her?
70010000121657.name: Tokyo Yakuza Idols: Save the Heart of a Rebel Girl

70010000121663.description:
The city knows his name. It doesn't know him at all.

Under the lights he's flawless, magnetic, exactly what the industry built him to be.

But the version of him that exists after midnight, in the back rooms and rain-slicked streets of Tokyo, belongs to a world most people never see.

Tokyo Yakuza Idols: Save the Heart of a Rebel Boy is a narrative visual novel about finding someone real inside a life built on performance and silence.

You weren't supposed to matter to him.

But something shifted, and now he keeps finding reasons to come back.

Each character carries the weight of a double life: the idol the world worships and the person underneath, complicated, guarded, and quietly hoping someone will stay long enough to understand.

Loyalty, ambition, loss, rebellion. Every route goes somewhere different and somewhere deeper.

Your choices decide whether he stays locked inside the life he was given... or finally takes the risk of letting someone in.


Features:

● DUAL LIVES, ONE HEART: Each character lives between the idol stage and the yakuza underworld, and both sides of him are real.

● IMPACTFUL CHOICES: Build trust, push boundaries, and shape how his story ends.

● EXCLUSIVE SCENES: Unlock hidden moments that go beyond the performance and into who he actually is.

● MULTIPLE ENDINGS: Stay together, get drawn into his world, lose him to it, or rewrite everything.

● WIN HIS HEART IN 30 DAYS: You have one month to earn his heart. Every decision counts, every moment matters, and time waits for no one.


He learned to survive by staying out of reach.
Are you capable of conquering his heart?
70010000121663.intro:
He shines on stage and disappears into the night.
No one gets close. No one lasts.
Until you.
70010000121663.name: Tokyo Yakuza Idols: Save the Heart of a Rebel Boy

70010000121906.description:
Retro Arcade-style Rally Racing in re-purposed Parking Garages in big cities across the USA

The “Parking Garage Rally Circuit” tour comes into a city, selects a parking garage, and temporarily turns it into an exciting rally course for a week-long competition. Each track in the game is styled as a unique parking garage that has been turned into a race course.

This is a hybrid of Rally and circuit racing. From rally it draws the jumps and “one racer at a time against the clock” time-trial format. However, the tracks are similar to circuit racing, with each race consisting of multiple laps around the same track (the track may change slightly from lap to lap, however). Controls are very tight, simple and arcade-like, similar to go-karting games (accelerate, reverse, steer, drift), but with a bit more dynamic “smash into things” physics.

Connect some controllers and relive the glory days of split-screen multiplayer for 2-4 players!
70010000121906.intro: Retro Arcade Rally Racing... in Parking Garages?!? Precision driving with tight simple controls and arcade physics, all in a 90s game console style presentation
70010000121906.name: Parking Garage Rally Circuit

70010000123394.description:
Enter a surreal platforming adventure where the world constantly changes around you. This is more than a journey through obstacles - it’s a challenge where the environment itself becomes part of the puzzle.

Using the power of a rotating, you’ll manipulate the world to find new paths, avoid dangers, and uncover hidden ways forward. Every level introduces fresh challenges that test your reflexes, timing, and ability to adapt to changing surroundings.

Collect coins, overcome mind-bending platforming sequences, and take on intense encounters where the entire arena shifts and moves beneath your feet. Some stages demand speed and precision, while others reward careful observation and creative thinking.

Blending dynamic gameplay, puzzle-solving, and fast-paced action, this adventure invites you to master a world where nothing stays still for long.
70010000123394.name: Inversion: The Single Path

70010000124159.description:
About the Story
After humanity disappeared from Earth, the robots at the Earth Post Office continue to operate. The postwoman from the Heaven Post Office was shot down, scattering letters everywhere. Although she eventually retrieved the letters, she still needs to evade the scrutiny of the Earth Post Office… Solve puzzle to help the protagonist escape her predicament. There is no text in the game.

Game Features
1. Original Music
2. Drawn on paper with pencil
3. Short games, approximately half an hour long
4. Three Endings

Author's Note
Hello everyone, I'm HAIM. This game is once again my own, encompassing the art, music, script, and programming. With the goal of ensuring that people around the world can enjoy this game regardless of language barriers, I deliberately challenged myself to create a text-free game, relying solely on visuals to help players understand the story and levels. This proved difficult, and it prolonged the development cycle. During this time, I also came up with more ideas, ultimately creating three endings (good, normal, and bad), giving the story greater depth.
70010000124159.intro:
P.I.S.=Postal Inspection Service
This is a point-and-click puzzle game with no dialogue, actions, or combat elements.
70010000124159.name: P.I.S. File

70010000125069.description:
Can you remember every detail of the handsome men who keep appearing?

"Wow, he was so cool! ...Wait, what was he wearing?"
"That smile was amazing! ...Did he have an earring?"
This isn't about admiring good looks — it's about noticing them.

This game is a 4-choice memory quiz where handsome characters flash before you and you must recall the tiny details.
In 60 seconds, commit hair color, clothing, accessories, and background items to memory, then answer questions about the image after it has been masked.

How to play is simple.
・Look at the image and memorize every detail in 60 seconds
・When the image is hidden, answer the multiple-choice question
・Get it right and the original image is revealed

The frustration of "I didn't notice that!" and the satisfaction of "I remembered it!" will keep you coming back.
100 questions featuring 100 different handsome characters.

Play one question at a time and sharpen your observation and memory skills.

Can you catch every detail before it slips away?

The game supports both button controls and touch controls, allowing you to play in TV mode, handheld mode, or tabletop mode.
70010000125069.intro:
What color was his tie again?
One glance is all you get.
70010000125069.name: Handsome Watching Face Memory Challenge

70010000125101.description:
Summer’s here, and hearts are skipping beats!
Speed Dates Summer Edition is your chance to meet five beautiful women, flirt, and dive headfirst into a summer full of fun, connection, and maybe even something real.
Each woman has her own vibe, her own story. Who’ll catch your eye? That’s totally up to you.

 walk on the beach, or a deep late-night talk under the stars?
Every date is different, and every moment holds a surprise. Sometimes it’s a laugh, sometimes it’s a silence that says it all.
The more you open up, the more the story pulls you in.

Features:
• Five Different Women – Each with her own energy. Some wild, some shy, some straight-up irresistible. Who’ll you click with?
• Real Places, Real People – Shot with real actors in real summer locations. Feels like a movie, but you're in it.
• Your Choices Shape It All – What you say and how you act change everything. This isn’t a fixed path — it’s your story.
• Natural Conversations, Real Chemistry – Everything flows. The scenes feel alive, and nothing’s fake or stiff.
•Multiple Endings – Every playthrough brings something new. Five women, tons of paths, and endless “what ifs.”
70010000125101.intro: Summer's here and hearts are heating up! Meet five different beauties, hang out, flirt a little... and maybe even find your summer romance. Your choices matter — and the story’s all you
70010000125101.name: Speed Dates Summer Edition

70010000125627.description:
Get ready for an explosion of jazz, cuteness, and organized chaos in To Bee Jazz, an irresistibly addictive puzzle where every drop can create the next big star of the band. Merge tiny musician bees, discover new evolutions, and transform a crowded stage into a spectacular show full of rhythm and personality.

Inspired by the most satisfying merge puzzles, the game blends light physics, strategic planning, and the perfect feeling of watching chain reactions unfold. Every bee bounces, slides, and finds its place while you try to stop the stage from becoming completely overcrowded.

Combine two identical bees to create increasingly sophisticated musicians and build a complete jazz band filled with instruments, style, and charm. But be careful: the more the board grows, the smarter your decisions need to be.

In Campaign Mode, missions and challenges test your creativity as you work to create specific bees for increasingly elaborate performances. In Endless Mode, the experience becomes even more strategic with special Power-Ups capable of shaking the stage, removing pieces, and reorganizing the chaos to keep the music alive for much longer.

With cozy visuals, a relaxing atmosphere, and a soundtrack full of personality, To Bee Jazz delivers the perfect combination of calm and strategy that makes you think “just one more run.”

Watch the stage, plan every drop, and let the jazz take over the hive.
70010000125627.intro: Drop the Beat, Merge the Bees, and Build the Perfect Band
70010000125627.name: To Bee Jazz

70010000126907.description:
What if a ticking time bomb was placed right in front of you?
What if you were surrounded by a raging fire?
What if you were caught in a bank robbery?

This is a puzzle-solving escape game that pulls you out of desperate situations.
Experience the ultimate adrenaline rush and the thrill of becoming an action movie hero, all from the comfort of your room! 
Whether you save the people around you depends entirely on your actions.
Will you break through the crisis and become a true hero, or...?

All the items you need to survive are hidden within the illustrations.
No complicated controls are required!
Just use your intuition and observation skills to find the items, assess the situation, and avert the crisis.
It's a great way to stimulate your brain while having fun.

Packed with a helpful hint system for beginners!
Never worry about getting stuck and giving up.
Even if you're new to puzzles or deduction games, you can experience the exhilarating feeling of solving mysteries without any frustration.

Perfect for a quick solo thrill to kill time, or as an exciting party game to play with friends and family to see who has the best survival instincts!
70010000126907.intro:
Crisis Point: How Will You Escape?
Solve Puzzles and Change Your Destiny!
70010000126907.name: Dead End Escape

70010000126919.description:
This is a game where you can quickly learn fun world trivia through simple True/False quizzes.

How to play is easy：
・Read the question carefully.
・Choose whether the answer is True or False.
・If you answer correctly, you can read a detailed explanation.

No complicated controls or text input required!
Just pick one of two choices (True or False), so even if you don't know the answer, you can rely on your intuition and enjoy the game stress-free.

We have a massive variety of questions, covering not only geography and history, but politics and literature too!

・The capital of Finland is Helsinki.
・The convenience store was invented in Japan.
・Plato is the author of ""Apology of Socrates.""

...and much more! 

Packed with trivia and general knowledge you'll want to brag about tomorrow.
A single playthrough only takes a few minutes, making it highly recommended for those looking for a quick brain workout during their commute or before bed.
70010000126919.intro:
"The Statue of Liberty is barefoot."← True or False!?
Acquire global trivia with a 2-choice quiz!
70010000126919.name: True or False THE WORLD

70010000127446.description:
Enjoy a learning quiz game based on Japanese words and phrases often seen in everyday outings and travel situations.

Answer questions about transport, sightseeing, food, signs, and daily conversation in a simple quiz format that is easy to start.

How to play:
・Read the question
・Choose the answer from the options
・Keep going and check your Japanese knowledge

No complicated controls are needed, so beginners can jump in right away.
Each question can be played at a smooth pace, making it great for short breaks, daily vocabulary practice, or relaxed solo play.

Recommended for:
・Players learning Japanese
・Anyone who enjoys word quizzes
・Families who want to play and learn together
・Players looking for a light brain-training game

Play alone at your own pace, or talk through the answers with family and friends.
Enjoy Japanese words and phrases with the feeling of a little outing!
70010000127446.intro:
Take a Japanese quiz on the go!
Practice signs, transport, food, and daily phrases
Build vocabulary in quick play sessions
70010000127446.name: Phrase Passport Japan A Travel Japanese Quiz

70010000129335.description:
Get ready for wobbly races, messy jumps, dramatic finishes, and epic recoveries!

Ultimate Wobble Run is a chaotic physics-based party racing game where little runners sprint, jump, fall, stumble, recover, and compete all the way to the finish line.

Race against the clock in single-player challenges. Learn each level, master the movement, discover better routes, and turn every messy attempt into a faster run.

Gather your friends and family for local multiplayer races with up to 4 players on the same console. Run for the checkered flag, survive unpredictable hazards, escape rising lava, and enjoy rounds where anything can happen.

Want to make the competition even more chaotic? Jump into Party Mode, where players place obstacles before the race begins. Protect your route, ruin someone else's plan, and then race through the mess everyone helped create.

Easy to understand, funny to watch, and satisfying to master, Ultimate Wobble Run combines arcade racing, physics-based movement, player-placed obstacles, and party game chaos into quick, replayable challenges for solo players and groups of friends.
70010000129335.intro:
Run fast. Fall hard. Build the chaos.
Get back up and reach the flag before everyone else!
70010000129335.name: Ultimate Wobble Run

70050000060801.description:
Award-winning narrative adventure Until Then brings two new riveting chapters following our beloved characters. Sofia returns home to memories she left behind. Mark meets a new lover and an old friend. On their own, they explore what it means to carry on living in the presence of absence. 

Play fresh minigames from tarot to baking, interact with engaging in-game phone apps for dating and video content, and run into beloved characters old and new across two chapters of gameplay. 

Chapter 1: Homecoming
Sofia returns home amidst a lockdown—a lot has changed. Familiar places have vanished, people have grown up, and at the same time, she has to confront the past she'd conveniently left behind.

Chapter 2: Sparks
Mark is the proud, responsible head of a college organization. There he finds love and an unexpected old friend. Has he truly changed as a person or will a spark burn down everything he's built?  

Requires the base game to play.
70050000060801.intro: Follow Mark & Sofia through two riveting chapters in the aftermath of our story
70050000060801.name: Until Then: Afterimages

70070000036988.description:
The Deluxe Edition includes:

- Until Then 
- Until Then Afterimages DLC

In a world still recovering from catastrophe, Mark Borja and his friends navigate the joys and woes of another year of high school. Wake up in a typical teenage bedroom, practice piano, race to meet homework deadlines, and build (and burn) relationships, as you reminisce about the daily insecurities of high school life. 

That is, until a fateful meeting sets off a chain reaction, upending Mark's life. People disappear and memories prove unreliable. Uncover a hidden truth with Mark and his friends in this narrative adventure and race to unravel the mystery before it's too late.

Play Out Your Own Adventure
Meet a diverse and achingly familiar cast of characters to converse with in person, over text, and through email. Get to know them, build relationships, flunk group projects, and watch how their individual personal stories unfold alongside yours.

Investigate the Setting through Everyday Technology
Explore the depths of social media where your likes and comments may pose consequences. Scroll through social posts, emails, webpages, and more on your in-game smartphone, where you might discover hints and clues about the people and world around you. Chat with your friends, classmates, and even strangers. 

Explore Themes of Love, Loss, and Friendship
Tackle philosophical issues as the main character. Make mistakes and difficult choices. Will Mark stand up for his friends and be there when they need him or will he let them down? Can he heal his wounds by letting go of the past? Decide for yourself how Mark grows and strives to do better throughout the story. 

Play Addictively Mundane Minigames
Insert a flash drive—oh wait, wrong way—nope, it was right the first time. Fight your friend for more fishballs at the food stand outside. Get in the groove to pay for the jeepney. Lose yourself in little games you find yourself playing in everyday life.

Immerse Yourself in a Cinematic Visual Experience
Witness an intriguing narrative uniquely presented in eye-catching hand-drawn pixel art and immerse yourself in the warm colors and music of a world trying to move on from tragedy.  Characters, landscapes, and props blend in 3D. Shadows, reflections, and lighting set the tone in a lovingly crafted experience. 

Experience a World Inspired by Philippine Locations and Culture
Traverse Philippine-inspired landscapes in search for the truth. From the heart of the bustling capital to long bus rides past grass fields and coast towns, explore the world of Until Then set in a fictional version of the Philippines. Interior spaces are shaped by the mannerisms of the locals, setting the scene for a recent past.
70070000036988.name: Until Then: Deluxe Edition

70010000117555.description:
Our cat and his beloved goldfish were exploring distant planets and galaxies when he suddenly crashed on an unknown planet.

Miraculously surviving, he discovered the planet was inhabited by horrific skeletal monsters.

To escape the planet, he'll have to repair his ship by scavenging bolts and fuel from the planet's labyrinths.

But be careful, the planet creates copies of the cat to complicate his escape. Avoid mines, sharp spikes, and enemies.


Features:
* Dynamic gameplay.
* Clones go synchronically with Cat.
* Old-school graphics.
* Simple controls.
70010000117555.intro: Will this black alien cat save the universe?
70010000117555.name: Alien Cat 2 - Retro Collection

70010000123207.description:
Infiltrate a luxury hotel and complete different tasks. Quiet paws and a bit of attitude are all you need for success!

- A Cat’s Eye View
See the world from just four inches off the ground. Explore the cozy hotel lobby as a curious little cat, wandering through warm lounges, reception areas, sofas, plants, luggage corners, and decorative spaces filled with charm and relaxing atmosphere.

- Cozy Hotel Atmosphere
Enjoy a calm and peaceful experience focused on exploration and cozy vibes. Soft lighting, relaxing music, and detailed interiors turn the hotel hall into a warm and comforting place perfect for quiet adventures.

- Playful Exploration
Jump onto counters, walk across furniture, rest in cozy corners, and freely explore the hotel lobby at your own pace. Every small detail of the environment helps create a relaxing and charming experience.

- A Warm Living Space
The entire game takes place inside a hotel hall designed to feel alive, stylish, and welcoming. From the reception desk to lounge areas and decorative corners, the lobby is filled with cozy visual details and relaxing ambiance.
70010000123207.intro: A charming adventure from a cat's perspective.
70010000123207.name: Strays POV Tales

70010000124694.description:
No roads. No limits. Only the path you choose.

Take control of powerful 4x4 vehicles and explore wild, unpredictable environments where every decision matters. In Offroad Craft Runner 4x4 Simulator, the focus is not speed — it’s control, planning, and the ability to overcome challenging terrain.

Drive through mud, snow, sand, and rocky landscapes where each surface affects your movement and forces you to adapt. Choosing the right path becomes essential as you navigate through difficult conditions, avoid hazards, and complete missions in remote locations.

Every mission is an expedition. You deliver cargo, locate objectives, rescue targets, and explore unknown areas while managing your vehicle’s performance. Damage, terrain resistance, and route selection all impact your progress, making each journey a test of skill and patience.

There are no fixed roads — you decide how to reach your destination. Explore different routes, discover hidden areas, and uncover pieces of a larger story as you move through diverse environments inspired by real-world locations

Key Features:
	•	Drive through terrain that constantly pushes your control
	•	Plan your route instead of following fixed roads
	•	Complete missions built around exploration and precision
	•	Manage your vehicle and overcome natural obstacles
	•	Progress through increasingly demanding environments
Take your time, choose your path, and push your limits.
In Offroad Craft Runner 4x4 Simulator, every journey is about control, strategy, and exploration.
70010000124694.name: Offroad Craft Runner 4x4 Simulator

70010000125498.description:
Get ready for a microscopic battle full of strategy in Immunuzzle, an engaging pixel art puzzle where every move can change everything. Use pieces inspired by the immune system to contain a spreading infection, turning each decision into a true test of planning and intelligence.

Choose your pieces carefully, place each one with precision, and watch the infection react immediately to every move. Here, no action comes without consequences. Every placement shapes the future of the board, blocks paths, and completely redefines the threat.

With constantly evolving challenges, you will face increasingly complex layouts, tight chokepoints, and infection patterns that demand quick thinking and strategic vision. This is not just about filling spaces, it is about mastering the field, controlling the spread, and turning chaos into order.

With retro visuals full of personality, smart mechanics, and that satisfying feeling of solving something tough, Immunuzzle delivers a unique experience. Perfect for players who love challenging puzzles, impactful decisions, and hard-earned victories.

Observe, plan, and fight the infection until you take full control.
70010000125498.intro: Defend the Body, Control the Chaos
70010000125498.name: Immunuzzle

70070000036788.description:
Your adventure begins with Food Truck Tycoon. Cook, chop, bake and enjoy hundreds of unique dishes.

But the journey of a thousand dishes is just the beginning!

As you hone your cooking skills and build your reputation with food trucks, you'll be given the opportunity to explore more gourmet games as DLC.

Customize your kitchen with countless upgrades and serve delicious food in different locations. Keep the grill hot, keep your customers smiling, sauté, mix and serve to the top.

Face cooking challenges to become the ultimate chef in town!

So put on your apron, sharpen your knives and enter the cooking arena. Life is a party - let's cook delicious!

This bundle contains "Cooking Arena", "Sweet Bakery Tycoon", "Burger Chef Tycoon" and "Breakfast Bar Tycoon".
70070000036788.intro: Universe bursting with flavors and culinary adventures awaits!
70070000036788.name: Cooking Arena Elite Edition

70070000036791.description:
Inspired by the classics, developed for the modern audiences.

A classic revenge story set in a medieval fantasy world… with a touch of deadly modern firepower just to turn things up to eleven. Fight through the armies of undead, mutants, aliens, machines and beasts in order to get back what is rightfully yours and bring some semblance of peace back to the land. Who knows - if you’re thorough enough you might even discover the history of the kingdom itself, long lost to the scholars of the realm.

Knights & Guns brings you to a dangerous world where you will fight, alongside your friend, against demons, ghouls & ghosts. Use shotguns, lasers and the power of chivalry to overcome every obstacle. Become the best version of a knight - one with a gun.

Inside the game:
•	Fight awesome bosses on various stages! 
•	Conquer the non-linear world! Rush through over 150 hand crafted stages, or enjoy the game at your own pace, looking for secrets and special routes!
•	Entire game designed for both single player or co-op multiplayer. Invite a friend at any time for some extra firepower and mayhem.
•	60 fps gameplay! Try the different modes! Hunt the monsters! Survive! Play on small, big and narrow maps!
•	Check out all the awesome suits of armor and, of course, all the GUNS! Lasers, shotguns, grenade launchers, sniper rifles... They are all here!
•	Over 30 unique guns. (That’s probably more flavors of death than flavors of ice cream you can name.)
•	Over 25 types of enemies, 5 types of mini-bosses and 3 types of bosses. Most of these come in different colors, too.
•	30 unique suits of armor for the knights. Extra protection and extra style!
•	Traps, chests, keys, scrolls of lore, books of monsters...

This bundle includes base game, Expansion Pack #2, Armor Pack #1 and Armor Pack #4 with:
- 10 new levels for you to bring back the peace
- 8 new armors to help you on your quest
- New enemies for that extra little kick
70070000036791.intro: Knight in shining armor, fight your way... with Guns!
70070000036791.name: Knights & Guns Enhancement Edition

70070000036796.description:
Urban Flow is a game about the subtle beauty of city streets filled with cars moving in perfect harmony. But such order does not happen all by itself - the city needs YOU to control the traffic lights and to make sure everything goes smoothly. That means no crashes, no jams. Everything will run perfectly - as long as you stay focused!

Immerse yourself in a beautiful, hand-crafted, low-poly world to discover the enormous satisfaction of watching the hundreds of tiny, colorful cars flowing through the streets – all while listening to the chill, urban music.

Over 100 levels, each with its own busy intersection. You have one job: operate the lights and keep it safe.

Party Game (even if you party all alone!)
-----
 Play by yourself or with friends in scalable drop-in, drop-out local co-op mode for two, three, or four players!
You can help your friends or be a little rascal and spread the chaos!

Avoid accidents by paying close attention to special vehicles and to the other players. Special vehicles include the ambulance, which can’t wait for long, and the tank – which will plow through anything in its way.

Don’t want to play the campaign?
-----
 Try our score-based Endless Mode or the Chill Mode - where you play for as long as you want, no rush and no score - only you and the music. Urban Flow is designed to be a great single player experience!

Discover various environments and weather conditions. Play with touch controls, Pro Controllers or Joy-Con™. Complete challenges and unlock rewards.

This bundle includes base game, Winter Expansion Pack, Streets Supplement and Streets Supplement #3 with:

•    20 new stages!
•    12 new vehicles (withthe firetruck and snow plow!)
•    Enjoy the winter theme and new music!
70070000036796.intro: Manage the city lights and try to avoid the chaos!
70070000036796.name: Urban Flow Luxury Edition

70010000121264.description:
Wake up trapped inside a train with no memory of how you got there. Beyond the windows, endless darkness stretches across abandoned tracks while an unknown presence follows close behind. The fuel gauge keeps dropping, and every passing station may hold the supplies needed to survive — or something far worse.

Oni Station is a tense atmospheric horror experience set aboard a lonely moving train where fear, mystery, and survival collide. Travel through eerie stations, uncover fragments of the forgotten past, and face the constant pressure of something lurking just out of sight. The deeper you go, the more the truth begins to unravel.

Features:
	•	Dark atmospheric horror inspired by psychological tension and urban legends.
	•	Procedurally generated stations that create a different journey every time.
	•	Immersive train setting filled with mystery, danger, and unsettling discoveries.
	•	Resource-focused survival where every decision matters.
	•	Online leaderboards to challenge other survivors around the world.
	•	Haunting sound design and environments that keep the tension alive until the very end.


How long can you keep the train moving before the darkness finally catches up? Step aboard Oni Station, uncover the secrets hidden along the tracks, and survive a journey where every stop could be your last.
70010000121264.intro: How long can you outrun the dark?
70010000121264.name: Oni Station

70010000091814.description:
A murdered drifter awakens- alive again, seconds before his death. Hunted and haunted, help him untangle a mad web of conspiracy in this fast-paced point 'n click thrill-ride.

FEATURES

• A Pulp Adventure Thriller from the minds that brought you Crawl.
• An engrossing roller-coaster of a story- Drawing on King, Crichton and Carpenter, with a dash of 70s Aussie grindhouse.
• Unique twin-stick controls built ground up for both handheld and couch play!
• Bursting with raw crunchy pixel art and high-impact animation.
• Professionally voice acted, with a brooding dark-synth cinematic score.
                        
SYNOPSIS

Mick Carter's been drifting a while now- moving from job to job, never staying one place long. Jumping a box-car to his old home town, he witnesses a violent murder, is pursued by hi-tech soldiers, thrown in a reservoir and drowned.

And that's just the start of Mick's problems.

His consciousness ripped away, thrust back into his own body seconds before his death...

Framed for the killing he witnessed, tormented by his own past, and haunted by the feeling that something followed him back from the other side...

Follow Mick as he's sucked headfirst into a lunatic web of shadowy corporations, murder, and the thousand-year obsession of a madman.

GAMEPLAY

The Drifter is our take on a classic 2d point and click adventure- with the brake-lines cut. The focus is on fast-paced storytelling, with puzzle-solving being the glue that ties it together. Mick's a practical guy, and so puzzles are down-to-earth too, designed to be unobtrusive, and give an investigative feel.

We're keeping the pacing quick and lean, you'll never be wandering around lost or confused- Mick is propelled through the story at a good clip, from one situation to another, with barely a moment to catch his breath. One minute you'll be crafting a Molotov cocktail from a bottle of over-proof rum, the next interrogating a crooked neurosurgeon before swinging from a high-rise window by a fraying extension lead.
70010000091814.name: The Drifter

70010000099148.description:
Set forth on your quest to [INSERT GOAL HERE] with one of the worthy yet quirky heroes in solo or cooperative play, local and online. Hack, slash, and dodge through hordes of enemies and deadly traps in procedurally generated runs of hand-crafted rooms and levels using each hero's unique attacks and abilities to your advantage.

Sharp reflexes and split-second decisions are crucial to survival as the intensity ratchets up as each run delivers new surprises, branching paths, and unrelenting bosses to conquer. Gobble up coins to spend at Bruce & Goose's Shoppe as you take a breath from the action to gain new perks, devastating attacks and summoned allies. Stack them right, and you'll unleash screen-filling destruction of arcade legend.

Keep an eye out for secrets among the chaos as this land holds many mysteries with new paths and locations, new heroes to rescue and add to your roster, and more…

Double Trouble
Charge forth alone or bring a co-op buddy to tackle dungeons together, combine powerful attacks and revive one another if you fall in battle.

Choose Your Own Adventure
Each run offers hand-crafted screens, unique bosses, and evolving routes shaped by player choices and quests.

Rogue's Gallery
Unlock nine distinctive heroes with unique skills, side objectives, and customizable trinkets that alter gameplay.

Arcade Alchemy
Chain perks and elemental powers through combat performance for explosive, high-reward playstyles.
70010000099148.intro: Dark Scrolls is a fantasy-themed action platformer that fuses shmup-style chaos with roguelite progression and is packed with charm, challenge, and secrets.
70010000099148.name: Dark Scrolls

70010000127963.description:
A murdered drifter awakens- alive again, seconds before his death. Hunted and haunted, help him untangle a mad web of conspiracy in this fast-paced point 'n click thrill-ride.

FEATURES

• A Pulp Adventure Thriller from the minds that brought you Crawl.
• An engrossing roller-coaster of a story- Drawing on King, Crichton and Carpenter, with a dash of 70s Aussie grindhouse.
• Unique twin-stick controls built ground up for both handheld and couch play!
• Bursting with raw crunchy pixel art and high-impact animation.

And that's just the start of Mick's problems.

His consciousness ripped away, thrust back into his own body seconds before his death...

Framed for the killing he witnessed, tormented by his own past, and haunted by the feeling that something followed him back from the other side...

Follow Mick as he's sucked headfirst into a lunatic web of shadowy corporations, murder, and the thousand-year obsession of a madman.

GAMEPLAY

Mick's a practical guy, and so puzzles are down-to-earth too, designed to be unobtrusive, and give an investigative feel.

We're keeping the pacing quick and lean, you'll never be wandering around lost or confused- Mick is propelled through the story at a good clip, from one situation to another, with barely a moment to catch his breath. One minute you'll be crafting a Molotov cocktail from a bottle of over-proof rum, the next interrogating a crooked neurosurgeon before swinging from a high-rise window by a fraying extension lead.
70010000127963.intro: A pulp adventure thriller – Enhanced for Nintendo Switch™ 2
70010000127963.name: The Drifter – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

70050000074177.description: Delve into the thrilling world of The Drifter on Nintendo Switch™ 2!
70050000074177.intro: A pulp adventure thriller – Enhanced for Nintendo Switch™ 2
70050000074177.name: The Drifter – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70010000114418.description:
Wanderstop is a narrative-centric cozy game about change and tea. Playing as a fallen fighter named Alta, you’ll manage a tea shop within a magical forest and tend to the customers who pass through. But Alta does not want to be here. And if she gets her way, the tea shop will be nothing but a brief and painful memory.
 
 
 Wanderstop is a tea shop management ritual. Grow and harvest the ingredients needed for tea, and then mix them together in an unusual tea-making contraption. Along the way, speak with the many travelers who pass through the shop, learn their stories and make tea that’s just right for them.
 
 In your downtime, you might tidy up around the clearing, decorate the shop in your style, or just sit on a bench with a cup of tea and listen to your own thoughts. Maybe doing nothing at all is okay. The shop demands patience, it rejects those who have come only in the pursuit of growth unchecked.
 
 And that’s why Alta can’t be here. It’s why she’ll never make it. This isn’t who she is. No, she’s a fighter! Why would anyone insist on turning the world’s greatest championship warrior into a docile shopkeeper?! With everything she’s capable of?? No no no, she won’t, she won’t do it... she can’t…
 
 Wanderstop is a game from the team at Ivy Road, including Davey Wreden (creator of The Stanley Parable and The Beginner’s Guide), Karla Zimonja (co-creator of Gone Home and Tacoma) and Daniel “C418” Rosenfeld (the music of Minecraft).
70010000114418.intro: A narrative-centric cozy game about change and tea
70010000114418.name: Wanderstop

70010000121345.description:
Hit the road and build your path as a professional truck driver in a world driven by delivery, precision, and control. Truck Simulator Driver 2026 puts you behind the wheel of powerful trucks, where every journey is a new challenge and every delivery depends on your skills.

Take on a wide range of transport missions, from standard cargo to heavy and oversized loads that require careful handling. Plan your routes, stay focused on the road, and make sure every delivery reaches its destination safely and on time.

Explore diverse environments with long highways, narrow roads, and demanding routes that push your control and decision-making. Each trip requires attention and the ability to adapt your driving style depending on the cargo and conditions.

Customize your trucks to match your preferences. Improve performance, upgrade parts, and prepare your vehicle for more complex deliveries as you progress.
Manage essential elements like fuel and timing. Plan your stops, stay efficient, and keep your deliveries on track without delays.


Key Features:
- Realistic truck driving experience
- Delivery missions with different cargo types
- Vehicle customization and upgrades
- Resource management during long routes
- Diverse roads and driving conditions
- Progressive gameplay with increasing challenges

Drive further. Deliver better. Stay in control.
70010000121345.name: Truck Simulator Driver 2026

70010000083070.description:
◆ Welcome to Mousebusters!
You just moved into your new place, and are excited to settle in…when all of a sudden, you get turned into a mouse! Thankfully, you soon meet a fellow rodent who knows how to help.
He asks you to call him “Chief,” and explains that there’s only one way to break the curse: by ridding the whole apartment building of the ghosts that haunt its inhabitants!

◆ Get to Know Your New Neighbors
In each apartment, you'll find a different ghost—but it won't be that easy to track them down. It seems they prey on negative emotions, so in order to smoke them out, you'll have to do some major recon to figure out each resident's biggest insecurities. Just don't get caught!

◆ A Partner You Can Count On
Luckily, you won't have to go it alone, because you'll be in frequent contact with the Chief throughout each mission. From his comfy desk at HQ, he'll offer plenty of guidance and comedic commentary as you scour the building and solve puzzles to find each ghost.

◆ Engage in Ghost-Zapping Action!
Once you've tracked down the source of each resident's woes, you'll have to whip out your trusty ray gun and perform a good ol' fashioned exorcism. Protect yourself from projectiles while targeting their weak points to expose their spectral cores!

◆ Venture Down the Rabbit Hole
Over the course of your investigations, you'll slowly uncover more and more evidence that suggests something far more ominous is going on with this building...and it seems the Chief knows more about the curse than he's letting on. Just how deep does this conspiracy go?
70010000083070.intro: Explore a haunted apartment building to save its cute and quirky residents in this pint-sized pixel adventure!
70010000083070.name: Mousebusters

70010000123095.description:
Join VTuber Mitako's cursed village livestream, chat along as First-Time Hitto, and watch a goofy occult trip spiral into ritual horror.

Mitako is live, loud, and ready to turn a trip to Shimofuri Village into content.

As First-Time Hitto (a fresh face in her chat), you are not just watching from the sidelines — you are in the chat, choosing comments, reacting with regulars like Occult Sukio and Saw-the-Worst Mitazou, and helping shape the mood of the stream.

The deeper Mitako digs into the rumors haunting Shimofuri Village, the more the livestream begins to feel like a movie you cannot look away from.
Keep the chat moving, enjoy the banter, and slowly realize what kind of rules the village has been living by.

A chat-style visual novel blending VTuber energy, Japanese occult comedy, and slow-burn horror.

- Play as a viewer inside Mitako's livestream chat — your comments shape the stream.
- Follow a chaotic VTuber trip into Shimofuri Village.
- A descent from casual chat comedy to creeping folkloric horror.
- Meet Mitako, Pero, Occult Sukio, Saw-the-Worst Mitazou, and the unsettling people of Shimofuri Village.
70010000123095.intro:
She wanted to go viral — she got something worse.
Some streams should never go live.
A VTuber horror you won't unsee.
70010000123095.name: Mitako Tatatari's Cult Village Stream ZP

70010000123261.description:
Weird science and block-pushing puzzle mechanics combine for a brainteasing adventure in Rat Protocol!

When an experiment unexpectedly grants humanoid strength and intelligence to a lab rat, the scientists in charge decide to test the limits of their creation’s newfound abilities. Guide the lab rat through increasingly tricky chambers by pushing crates, blocking dangerous laser beams, activating switches and detonating explosives. Find the right order to clear obstacles so the lab rat can reach key cards to open doorways and proceed to the next test. 

Will you make the experiment a success or lead your rodent to an untimely demise?

• Test the limits of a mutated lab rat in top-down puzzle adventure style!
• Solve increasingly complex puzzles to escape each tricky chamber.
• Avoid hazards and collect key cards to help the lab rat survive!
• Block laser beams, activate switches, push crates and more in the correct order.
• Enjoy retro pixel art aesthetics and a whimsical narrative about twisted science!
70010000123261.intro: Escape dangerous labs as a mutated rodent in a pushing puzzle adventure about twisted experiments!
70010000123261.name: Rat Protocol

70050000056421.description: Adds Character 4 to the roster of playable characters.
70050000056421.name: Additional Character 4

70010000050716.description:
Live the life of an escaped worker, washed-up on a lawless station at the edge of an interstellar society. Inspired by the flexibility and freedom of Tabletop RPGs, explore the station, choose your friends, escape your past and change your future.

ABOUT THIS GAME
One of 2022’s most acclaimed indies, the Game Awards-nominated Citizen Sleeper is a Tabletop-inspired narrative RPG set on Erlin’s Eye, a ruined space station that is home to thousands of people trying to survive on the edges of an interstellar capitalist society.

You are a sleeper, a digitised human consciousness in an artificial body, owned by a corporation that wants you back. Thrust amongst the unfamiliar and colourful inhabitants of the Eye, you need to build friendships, earn your keep, and navigate the factions of this strange metropolis, if you hope to survive to see the next cycle.

ROLL THE DICE. DO THE WORK. GET PAID. SURVIVE.
Inspired by Tabletop Roleplaying games, Citizen Sleeper uses Dice, Clocks and Drives. Each cycle you use the dice you are dealt to choose what to do with your time. Make or break alliances, uncover truths and escape your hunters. Survive and ultimately thrive, one cycle at a time.

TURN UP FOR YOUR FRIENDS
The station plays host to characters from all walks of life, trying to eke out an existence among the stars. Salvagers, engineers, hackers, bartenders, street-food vendors, each has a history which brought them here. You choose which of them you wish to help, and together you will shape your future.

ACCESS THEIR SECRETS
Eventually, you will learn to use your dice to hack into the station’s cloud to access decades of digital data, uncover new areas and unlock secrets. This is your unique power, and with it you can change your future. Corporate secrets, rogue AIs and troves of lost data await those willing to dive into the depths of the station’s networks.

YOU WERE MADE TO DIE
Essen-Arp: to them you are just property, one more asset in a portfolio that stretches across the stars. You are the product of an abusive system, in a universe where humanity’s expansion is marked by exploitation and extraction. Escape the makers of your decaying body, and chart your own path in a richly imagined, deeply relevant sci-fi world which explores ideas of precarity, personhood and freedom.

THE COMPLETE EXPERIENCE
Citizen Sleeper now includes all three post-launch DLC episodes FLUX, REFUGE and PURGE, which expand the game and introduce additional characters and locations to Erlin’s Eye in an exciting new late game storyline.
70010000050716.intro: ROLEPLAYING IN THE RUINS OF INTERPLANETARY CAPITALISM
70010000050716.name: Citizen Sleeper

70010000103344.description:
SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim is an adventure game set in 2000s Japan about the lives of Saeko, a girl with mysterious abilities, and the little people she has shrunk to the size of her thumb. Experience Saeko's and the little people's fates in the day and at night, through two separate game systems with different art styles.

You are Rin, the latest addition to the little people. Under Saeko’s protection, you spend your days in her desk drawer together with the other little people.
But don't let your guard down. Saeko has some...interesting hobbies, to say the least.

・Stunning and unique visuals drawn in two different styles of pixel art
・A world filled with brutal allure inspired by many strange tales, beginning with Fueti Shizue’s work
・An original game system which forces players to make difficult choices and live with the consequences
・A soundtrack heavily influenced by future garage and breakcore, composed by the developer himself
・The deepest journey into a developer’s proclivities in indie game history
70010000103344.intro: You opened your eyes to find a giant girl looking down at you...
70010000103344.name: SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim

70010000119729.description:
Burn rubber, fire rockets, and survive the arena in this explosive combat racing experience.

RACE: Rocket Arena Car Extreme throws you into a post-apocalyptic world of armored cars, deadly tracks, and all-out vehicular warfare. Every race is a battle where speed, firepower, and survival decide who rules the arena.

Play solo or challenge friends in local split-screen mode and prove who dominates the battlefield.

Pick from 21 unique cars, each with its own ultimate ability, upgrade path, and special body kits. Choose your class - SPEEDSTER, GUNNER, or CRUSHER - and master a wide arsenal of abilities, from rocket salvos and mini-missiles to teleport swaps, laser drones, flamethrowers, ghost summons, freezing blasts, and electric traps.

Race through 7 locations, face 5 unique bosses, and test your skills across Career, Event, Season, and Split-Screen modes. Every boss features distinct mechanics and attack patterns, from rocket barrages and enemy summons to teleport strikes, poison shots, and ice crystal traps.

With a variety of mission types and deep upgrade systems, every run offers a new way to dominate the road.

Event mode features tournaments built around specific cars, where you build your run by choosing skill cards between stages and survive with a single shared HP bar.

Season mode introduces daily challenges and leaderboards - complete missions, set records, and earn rewards.

Features:
• 20+ hours of combat racing in Career mode
• 21 unique cars with ultimate abilities
• 3 car classes: SPEEDSTER, GUNNER, CRUSHER
• 4 game modes: Career, Event, Season, Split-Screen
• 7 distinct locations and 5 unique bosses
• Wide range of weapons, abilities, and upgrades
• Local split-screen multiplayer on one console
70010000119729.intro: Jump into explosive combat racing where every track is a battlefield and every rival is a target.
70010000119729.name: RACE: Rocket Arena Car Extreme

70010000119811.description: Making a sandwich is not as easy as it seems. There are many obstacles to overcome in the kitchen to make a delicious meal. You have to be sure to use all the tasty ingredients in the right order. Give it a try and see if you can do it!
70010000119811.intro: Want to know how sandwiches are really made?
70010000119811.name: Run, Sandwich, Run!

70010000119930.description:
Clock Rogue is a roguelike action game that tests your sense of time.
Moves are set to specific times on a 12-second clock and must be activated by sharp timing using your internal clock.

Will you trust your sense of time and take risks for strong moves, or play it safe and advance cautiously? It's up to you!

◆A unique "time structure" combat system
- When you defeat an enemy, you'll get to choose from three moves to add to the clock.
- The stronger the move, the smaller its activation window.
- Consider each move's position carefully and build a clock that fits your playstyle.

◆Battling inside a hedgehog?!
- The game takes place within the body of a hedgehog.
- As Hari Cells, your goal is to protect the hedgehog from marauding viruses.

Build your own clock and protect the hedgehog!
70010000119930.intro: Are you confident in your internal clock?
70010000119930.name: Clock Rogue

70010000121383.description: Deliver mail as Catto, the town's dedicated Postcat, while meeting unique friends in a vibrant cozy town filled with kitty residents. As you explore the colorful town, encounter adorable residents and brighten up their day by helping them with silly little tasks.
70010000121383.intro: Deliver mail as Catto, the town's dedicated Postcat, while meeting unique friends in a vibrant cozy town filled with kitty residents.
70010000121383.name: Catto's Post Office

70010000122559.description:
Welcome to The Artifactory, a fast-paced couch co-op party game where teamwork, creativity, and a little factory chaos keep the production line moving.

Work together with up to four players to gather materials, craft items, and assemble loot boxes before the delivery trucks leave. Pass ingredients along conveyor belts, organize the production line, and keep the factory running smoothly.

But crafting isn’t just about following recipes. Experiment with different raw materials to discover new item combinations and unlock new ways to produce goods. The more you explore, the more efficient your factory can become.

Each level introduces new challenges — moving platforms, tricky conveyor layouts, and unpredictable obstacles that will test your coordination and communication.

Whether you are playing with friends, family, or going solo, every shift at the factory turns into a hilarious cooperative challenge where timing, teamwork, and quick thinking make all the difference.

Can your team master the machines and keep the deliveries on schedule?

Key Features
Local couch co-op for up to 4 players
Experiment with materials to discover new crafting recipes
Build and manage chaotic production lines
Creative factory environments with unique mechanics
Fast, cooperative party gameplay
Perfect for family game nights and multiplayer sessions
70010000122559.intro: Team up in a chaotic factory where crafting, experimentation, and fast teamwork keep the production line alive.
70010000122559.name: The Artifactory

70010000123584.description:
Move through 3D space to find hints, solve mysteries and escape from the room.
Anyone can play to the end because you can see hints and answers.
70010000123584.name: Escape game R00M14

70010000123973.description:
INCOMING BROADCAST
"Welcome to Rabbithole City, where all animals live a fulfilling life outside nature in this modern, neon-lit city - and it's all thanks to the mightiest species of all: bunnies! A few years ago, they brought us technological progress and a life of fun and pleasure. 

And the small price for such a life? Leaving your filthy natural habitat and your instincts behind. Especially you, carnivores, should change your ways if you want to be accepted in this glorious society. "


FREE THE OPRESSED
Not everyone agrees with the bunnies and many species are suffering under this strict rabbit regime.

You are recruited by a giant Owl who needs your help to sabotage the Bunny Tyranny. He gives you control over the body of a tiger-lynx, Kiyo, and sends you on various stealth and platforming missions to uncover the bunnies’ wicked plans. To avoid the merciless rabbit police, you'll need to make clever decisions about when to be stealthy or violent, or both. Hide in the dynamic shadows, use distractions, attacks, and ninja rope acrobatics, and don't get caught!


THE NIGHTLIFE IS CALLING
Take your time and get lost in the atmosphere of Rabbithole City. Learn more about life in this world, meet colorful characters, explore different locations, and discover how evil the bunnies really are.

Feel the seductive pull of the neon lights and immersive synth-wave beats, but be careful - do not lose sight of your mission.
70010000123973.intro: Kiyo, a feline ex-predator, is trapped in a neon-lit, dystopian city dominated by smartphone-addicted bunnies. Infiltrate the bunnies' facilities and free everyone from their tyrannical grip.
70010000123973.name: KIYO - Bunny Tyranny

70010000124396.description:
The world of legendary arcade games returns as a 3D puzzle!

■ How to Play

Simple controls. Just toss the Voxel-filled capsules into the field!
When two Voxels of the same kind collide, they transform into a larger one.
Keep them on the field—don't let them overflow!


■ Immerse Yourself in Classic Titles with Dedicated Stages & Sounds

Alongside a main stage that blends elements from multiple titles, you can enjoy dedicated stages for these all-time classics:
"PAC-MAN", "DIG DUG", "XEVIOUS", "MAPPY", and "THE TOWER OF DRUAGA"!

Beyond just the visuals, the iconic music will take your gameplay to the next level!


■ Collect Over 100 Unique Voxels

Clear various challenges to keep unlocking new ones!
Build your favorite lineup and enjoy a fully customized experience!


■ Build Your Own Gallery

Showcase your collection in the "Collection Room."
Arrange them freely to recreate your favorite memories or build the ultimate crossover universe!


■ Aim for the Top in Score Attack!

Relive the thrill of carving your name into the arcade high score board.
Compete in online rankings against players worldwide to claim the top spot!


* This product is software for Nintendo Switch™.
* There is also a Nintendo Switch™ 2 version of this product. Please be careful to avoid duplicate purchases.
70010000124396.intro:
Classic pixel art meets 3D!
Namco’s iconic characters are reborn as "voxels."
70010000124396.name: NAMCO LEGENDARY Mountains
