70010000125504.description:
Prepare yourself to challenge your logic in an adventure deep in the heart of the desert, where every movement could be your last. In Sands and Relics, walking is just as dangerous as it is necessary, and every step changes the world beneath your feet.

Cross ancient ruins, explore fragile pathways, and uncover hidden relics in clever puzzles that blend strategy, planning, and that satisfying feeling of discovering the perfect solution. Here, the ground waits for no one. Sand tiles crack, collapse, and disappear as you move forward, turning the environment into a living puzzle.

Each level is a compact logic challenge where you must think before acting, calculate routes, and carefully decide where to step. Some surfaces can withstand more than one step, while others collapse immediately, and a single mistake can leave you trapped in the void.

As the journey continues, new mechanics make the puzzles even more creative, including teleporters, narrow paths, and combinations that demand full awareness of the environment. All of this comes wrapped in charming pixel art visuals that create a cozy atmosphere while keeping your mind engaged.

With 30 carefully crafted levels, simple controls, and the freedom to undo moves or restart whenever you want, Sands and Relics delivers an accessible, smart, and deeply satisfying experience for players who love strategic puzzles without time pressure.

Observe the terrain, plan your route, and discover whether your footsteps will be enough to reach the lost relic.
70010000125504.name: Sands and Relics

70010000125758.description:
Hexara is a puzzle game where strategy meets satisfying combo-building. Rotate clusters of hexagons to match colors, create powerful formations, and climb to higher levels.

Simple to learn, but difficult to master, every move matters as the grid evolves and new challenges appear. Chain combos, create rare formations, and push your score further with each run.

Featuring multiple game modes, increasing difficulty, and endless replayability, Hexara is perfect for quick sessions or long high-score chases.

How far can you go before the grid fills up?
70010000125758.intro:
Build combos, outsmart the grid, chase the perfect run. Perfect for fans of classic puzzle games.
Easy to pick up, hard to put down.
70010000125758.name: Hexara

70010000125791.description:
The highly anticipated sequel to one of 2022’s most acclaimed RPGs!

You are a sleeper, an emulation of a human mind housed in an artificial body. You are on the run from the corporation that made you and the gang that seeks to control you. Commandeer a ship, build a network of crew and allies, and take on challenging contracts as you seek to build a future for yourself.

Choose a class, configure your skills and assemble your crew in unique tabletop-inspired gameplay. Your future depends on the roll of a dice, as you make difficult choices in a complex world. Reinventing the award-winning systems of Citizen Sleeper, this RPG will satisfy both fans of the original game and new players alike.

STAY AHEAD OF YOUR PAST
After a desperate attempt to free yourself from servitude by rewriting the very code that governs your system, you are on the run again, this time with a malfunctioning body, a price on your head and no memory of your past.

REBOOT / REBUILD / REPAIR
Citizen Sleeper’s revolutionary dice system returns, revised for the sequel. Manage your stress or take damage to your dice. Deal with glitches as they accrue in your system. Push yourself to get lucky and make this cycle count.

PUSH YOUR LUCK
Each character class now has a unique “Push” ability that can help you turn the tide of a difficult job or send you into a dangerous spiral depending on how and when you choose to use it. Reroll your dice to change your fate, or focus a single die to bet everything on a big success.

NAVIGATE THE BELT
Chart a course from hub to hub with complete freedom, taking on jobs and setting goals as you see fit. A living world, the Starward Belt rewards curiosity and care, but it's up to you to decide which locations and stories deserve your time and resources.

DO THE JOB, GET PAID
Contracts offer a new kind of focussed, tactical gameplay to the Citizen Sleeper experience. You’ll need to prepare carefully and choose the right approach for these multi-cycle, high-risk, high-reward jobs, but you’ll also have to react and adapt to both the roll of the dice and the twists and turns of each task.

CHOOSE YOUR FUTURE
Player choice is a massive part of the Citizen Sleeper experience, and the sequel deepens this with new skill checks that allow you to express your class and character in scenes, as well as branching storylines that will ask you to make hard choices. The future of your character is up to you.
70010000125791.name: Citizen Sleeper 2: Starward Vector – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition

70010000127154.description:
You landed on this island with a relationship back home and zero intention of complicating things. Then the girls showed up. 

Beautiful, bold, and completely unaware that you're supposed to be off limits. The problem is, so are they.

Work the island, build your reputation, and find yourself in situations you didn't plan for. Dates that start innocent and don't stay that way. Late night chats that go further than they should. 

Every girl here pulls at something different, and the more time you spend with them, the harder it gets to remember why you're supposed to say no. The in-game chat keeps you close even when you're apart. And distance, on an island this small, doesn't last long.

A girl who goes after what she wants without apology, one who pretends she feels nothing until she does, a wild one who makes terrible ideas sound perfect... None of them are asking you to choose. Not yet.

Someone is waiting for you. The island doesn't care.


Features:

● ISLAND JOBS & SKILL PROGRESSION: Build your life on the island and open doors you weren't supposed to open.

● DATES YOU WEREN'T SUPPOSED TO GO ON: Hidden coves, rooftop bars, late nights by the water. Every date is a line you're crossing.

● IN-GAME CHAT SYSTEM: Keep the conversations going. The ones back home, and the ones that are getting complicated.

● EXCLUSIVE GALLERY IMAGES: The further you go, the more unlocks. Some things can't be unseen.

● MULTIPLE ENDINGS: You can stay faithful. You can fall. You can burn everything down. The choice is yours.

● 30 DAYS ON THE ISLAND: The summer has an expiration date. Every day you waste is a door that closes forever.


Someone at home is waiting for you.
The girls on this island are not waiting for anyone.
How long can you hold out?
70010000127154.intro:
You have someone waiting at home.
But the island doesn't know that, and neither do they.
70010000127154.name: Love Island: Forbidden Girls Temptation

70010000127160.description:
You landed on this island with a relationship back home and zero intention of complicating things. Then the boys showed up.

Beautiful, bold, and completely unaware that you're supposed to be off limits. The problem is, so are they.

Work the island, build your reputation, and find yourself in situations you never saw coming. Dates that start as nothing and become something you don't have a name for yet. Late night chats that go places you didn't expect to go.

Every guy here pulls at something you didn't know was there, and the more time you spend with them, the harder it gets to look away. The in-game chat keeps you close even when you're apart. And on an island this small, distance doesn't fix anything.

A guy who goes after what he wants and doesn't hide it, one who acts untouchable until he isn't, a reckless one who makes bad decisions feel like the only option... None of them are asking you to choose. Not yet.

Someone is waiting for you. The island doesn't care.


Features:

● ISLAND JOBS & SKILL PROGRESSION: Build your life on the island and open doors you weren't supposed to open.

● DATES YOU WEREN'T SUPPOSED TO GO ON: Hidden coves, rooftop bars, late nights by the water. Every date is a line you're crossing.

● IN-GAME CHAT SYSTEM: Keep the conversations going. The ones back home, and the ones that are getting complicated.

● EXCLUSIVE GALLERY IMAGES: The further you go, the more unlocks. Some things can't be unseen.

● MULTIPLE ENDINGS: You can stay faithful. You can fall. You can burn everything down. The choice is yours.

● 30 DAYS ON THE ISLAND: The summer has an expiration date. Every day you waste is a door that closes forever.


Someone at home is waiting for you.
The boys on this island are not waiting for anyone.
How long can you hold out?
70010000127160.intro:
You have someone waiting at home.
But the island doesn't know that, and neither do they.
70010000127160.name: Love Island: Forbidden Boys Temptation

70010000128359.description:
William James Magnus III has been murdered, and you’re the only one with the investigative know-how to interrogate the other passengers and find the true culprit. But, with the train barreling towards the station, you only have so much time to solve the case before the murderer gets away.

Framed as a classic choose-your-own-adventure novel, Murder on the Disorient Express takes the best aspects of your favorite mystery novels and adds an interactive twist. Choose who you speak to, what you investigate, collect evidence, and make your final deduction based on limited information. Choose wisely, or the culprit will get off scot-free.

With only so many possible conversations to have and options to explore, Murder on the Disorient Express can’t be fully experienced in one playthrough. Take different paths and follow different leads to get a complete view of the events in additional playthroughs.

Talk with a cast of colorful characters, collect clues, and manage your time to seek out over a dozen possible endings. Unlock them all to see the full story.
70010000128359.intro:
An interactive murder mystery on the world famous train!
Step into the role of a cunning detective tasked with solving a perplexing murder before time runs out.
70010000128359.name: Murder on the Disorient Express

70050000070551.description:
Between Worlds
Not all places are meant to be destinations. The Train Station is a place of arrivals, departures, and fleeting encounters. Mortals pass through, never feeling safe, as though they are being watched. Platforms fade into the darkness. The tunnels echo with distant sounds from the past and the present. Panic spreads faster than the Phantom Train Conductor can operate his locomotive.

Introducing a new Train Station level built upon crowds, open spaces, and relentless motion. No place ever feels secure.

Introducing a new game mode: Second Side of the Coin.

For the first time, step into the role of a Ghost-breaker who hunts ghosts, sets traps, and experiences fear from the other side—where control is fleeting and fragile, resources are limited, and every mistake means punishment.
70050000070551.name: Between Worlds

70050000072887.description:
The long-awaited soundtrack by developer kyp — beloved even by the characters within the game — is finally available!

“Only boring nameless instrumental songs. It fits right with the image of a lonely and introverted girl.”
Kazu

“The music here stinks”
Kina
70050000072887.intro:
Original soundtrack by developer kyp.
A collection of tracks that bring back to life the everyday world inside that drawer.
70050000072887.name: SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim Soundtrack

70050000073547.description:
This Diorama set includes the following: 

- 20 New levels

- 20 Hidden jigsaw pieces to complete 4 new collectibles!

- 40 New stickers to decorate your photos!
70050000073547.intro: Discover and find the differences in the new handcrafted diorama set from Tiny Lands 2.
70050000073547.name: Diorama set 1

70050000073664.description:
Expand your garage with the RACE - Razor Pack!

Razor is a fast Speedster-class combat car built for high-speed arena racing. With a sharp futuristic body, cutting-edge combat gear, and a lightweight design, it is made to strike fast and outmaneuver rivals on post-apocalyptic tracks.

Its ultimate ability, Blade Storm, surrounds the car with a storm of blades, damaging enemies on collision.

This DLC includes:
- Razor car
- 6 vinyls
- 6 flags
- 4 avatars

Vinyls and flags can be used on any unlocked car.
70050000073664.intro: Unlock the Razor car and exclusive customization items.
70050000073664.name: RACE - Razor Pack

70070000037368.description:
Step into a disorienting and eerie world where every corridor feels alive and every shadow hides a secret. In Backrooms Pools, navigate vast pools of murky water, shifting walls, and echoing footsteps as you try to uncover what lurks in the darkness. Every turn deepens the tension and tests your courage.

This bundle includes main title and BACKROOMS POOLS: MONSTERS BELOW DLC, taking your nightmare further. Explore even deeper submerged corridors and face two terrifying new creatures that haunt the watery depths. Will you escape unscathed, or become just another shadow in the endless maze?

Survive, explore, and confront the horrors that wait beneath the surface.
70070000037368.intro: Face the unknown in the endless pools!
70070000037368.name: BACKROOMS POOLS GOLD EDITION

70070000037459.description:
Enter a nightmarish version of the ordinary in survival horror experience. Trapped inside an endless, eerie supermarket, you must explore abandoned aisles, solve cryptic puzzles, and search for an escape while something unseen stalks your every move. Flickering lights, shifting spaces, and a constant sense of dread turn every step into a test of survival.

This bundle includes the main title and the Backrooms: Exit from Supermarket Creepy Music DLC, intensifying the horror with a deeply unsettling soundtrack. Experience distorted ambient sounds, eerie supermarket jingles, and reactive audio that follows your every move, amplifying the tension with every step. The deeper you go, the more the sound itself becomes part of the nightmare.

Stay quiet, stay alert, and try to escape before the darkness and the sound consume you.
70070000037459.intro: Lost in the supermarket of nightmares
70070000037459.name: Backrooms: Exit from Supermarket GOLD EDITION

70070000037477.description:
You opened your eyes to find a giant girl looking down at you...

SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim is an adventure game set in 2000s Japan about the lives of Saeko, a girl with mysterious abilities, and the little people she has shrunk to the size of her thumb.
Experience Saeko's and the little people's fates in the day and at night, through two separate game systems with different art styles.

You are Rin, the latest addition to the little people. Under Saeko’s protection, you spend your days in her desk drawer together with the other little people.
But don't let your guard down. Saeko has some...interesting hobbies, to say the least.

・Stunning and unique visuals drawn in two different styles of pixel art
・A world filled with brutal allure inspired by many strange tales, beginning with Fueti Shizue’s work
・An original game system which forces players to make difficult choices and live with the consequences
・A soundtrack heavily influenced by future garage and breakcore, composed by the developer himself
・The deepest journey into a developer’s proclivities in indie game history

[The Digital Deluxe Edition includes the Original Soundtrack]
Original soundtrack by developer kyp.
A collection of tracks that bring back to life the everyday world inside that drawer.
70070000037477.intro: Get the Digital Deluxe Edition bundled with the Original Soundtrack!
70070000037477.name: SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim Digital Deluxe Edition

70010000124908.description:
Defend the gates. Survive the siege.
Step into a medieval battlefield where your strategy and skill decide the fate of the kingdom. Build defenses, fight back, and hold your fortress against relentless waves of invaders.
Prepare your defenses, place towers, and get ready for incoming waves of enemies. Each enemy type requires a different approach — from fast attackers to heavily armored units and powerful siege weapons that threaten to break your gates.
You are not just a commander — you fight alongside your defenses. Use your crossbow and repair structures during battle to keep your fortress standing. Every decision matters as the pressure increases with each wave.
Earn resources by defeating enemies and use them wisely to build new defenses or upgrade existing ones. Balance your strategy between offense and defense to handle growing threats and survive until the final wave.
With every attack, the battlefield becomes more intense, forcing you to adapt, reposition, and react quickly to protect your base at all costs.
Key Features:
	•	Combine FPS combat with tower defense gameplay
	•	Build and upgrade defensive structures
	•	Survive waves of increasingly powerful enemies
	•	Fight actively using weapons 
	•	Manage resources to strengthen your defense
	•	Face diverse enemy types and strategic challenges
Stand your ground, defend your kingdom, and survive every wave.
70010000124908.intro: Stand between chaos and the kingdom!
70010000124908.name: Medieval Castle Siege Defense vs Invaders

70010000125245.description:
Axel Quest is a retro-style action-adventure with Metroidvania elements.

Explore a dangerous pixel-art world, fight deadly monsters, defeat powerful bosses, and discover new paths as you progress. Along the journey, you'll collect equipment, meet helpful NPCs, and uncover hidden secrets that reward your curiosity.

With tight controls and fast-paced gameplay, Axel Quest offers a nostalgic experience inspired by classic 2D games, designed for both newcomers and seasoned players.


Features:
* Sword-based combat with responsive controls
* Secret areas and hidden paths to explore
* NPCs and shops to upgrade your equipment
* Challenging boss encounters
* Handcrafted pixel art visuals and retro soundtrack
70010000125245.intro: Explore a handcrafted pixel-art world inspired by retro classics.
70010000125245.name: Axel Quest

70010000126764.description:
Pixel Blaster DX is a fast-paced hybrid-casual color shooter and sorting puzzle game built for quick, satisfying gameplay sessions.
Tap, shoot, match colors, manage the conveyor belt, and clear pixel cube formations before your holders are full.
The rules are simple and easy to learn. Tap the color-coded sphere shooters on the left side of the screen to launch them onto the rotating circular conveyor belt.
Each sphere shoots cubes that match its own color, for example:
• Pink spheres shoot pink cubes
• Cyan spheres shoot cyan cubes
More colors appear as the challenge increases

Your objective is to clear all pixel cubes from the board. Each level features different cube formations, including fun shapes, items, icons, and emoji-style designs. But there is a twist. Every sphere has limited ammo. If a sphere still has remaining ammo after all matching targets are cleared, it drops into one of the waiting holder slots below. If all holder slots become occupied with unused spheres, the game is over. Plan carefully, shoot at the right time, and manage your queue before the board fills up.

Special Bonuses - Use special bonuses to overcome tricky stages:
• Shuffle - Re-shuffles all waiting spheres on the board.
• Holder - Adds one extra holder slot.
• Turtle - Slows down the movement speed of spheres on the conveyor belt.
• Skip - Skips the current level and moves you to the next stage.
• Spin -Drops bonus coins from the spin wheel.

Features
★ Marathon-style gameplay with more then 2000 unique levels
★ Fast-paced color shooter and sorting puzzle mechanics
★ Simple touch controls that are easy to learn
★ Handheld and Nintendo Switch™ Pro Controller support
★ Increasing difficulty with strategic challenges
★ Satisfying conveyor belt gameplay
★ Special power-ups and bonuses for difficult stages
★ Hand crafted fun pixel cube formations and colorful level designs
★ Global social leaderboards 
★ Professional sound effects and background music
★ Rumble support
70010000126764.intro: Tap, shoot, sort, and clear colorful pixel cubes in this fast-paced conveyor belt puzzle game!
70010000126764.name: Pixel Blaster DX

70010000129374.description:
The forest is at peace until lizards from space abduct the ranger! Now it’s up to a pair of plucky chipmunks, aka the Acorn Avengers, to make the rescue. Journey from the park all the way into space in a chase to save the beloved forest ranger. Toss boxes, hurl explosive barrels, climb trees, and most of all be sure to gather nuts!

Supports up to 2 player co-op.
70010000129374.intro: When the forest ranger is abducted, it's the Acorn Avengers to the rescue! Classic 16-bit platforming mayhem for up to 2 players co-op!
70010000129374.name: Acorn Avengers

70010000126729.description:
Face a variety of bosses, find secret keys, unlock powerful abilities, and gain access to areas that were once unreachable.

Overcome challenging stages filled with hidden dangers and wild creatures!

Unlock powerful hidden skills!

Engage in intense battles against dangerous bosses determined to protect their territories!

Survive the dangers lurking across diverse stages, and restore order to the kingdom before everything is consumed by the dragon's power!
70010000126729.intro: The fearsome Dragon of Illusion has kidnapped the princess and plunged nature into darkness. The Forest Kingdom stands on the brink of collapse, and only you can restore peace!
70010000126729.name: Dragon of Illusion

70010000111316.description:
Upon signing up to a perfectly normal battle of the bands contest for a bit of fun, Faye, Ian and Briff are cursed with an unusual power and find themselves sealed to a horrible fate. Surely there's a way to get out of it, there has to be! Even if it means... *shudder* working together.

Gameplay features:
- 15-20 hours of game time
- Kick down every single door you come across
- 100+ skills, 50+ accessories and 9 classes to customize the band with, each with their own special outfit
- Outfit choices are reflected in ALL dialogue portraits and cutscenes
- Excessive amounts of hand-drawn frame-by-frame animation
- Inventive battle system that combines real-time and turn-based gameplay
- Rich soundtrack spanning a wide variety of genres
- Highly praised writing and humour
- Memorable dungeons - From traversing the hair of a giant tree lady to crowdsurfing through an entire arena
- Item system that says GOOD RIDDANCE to tedious inventory management
- 120+ unique NPCs, all with their own dialogue portraits
- Late game dating segment with 12+ endings
- You can actually use status effects on bosses!
- Singing fish are an integral part of the story
- NEW! Easy mode
- NEW! Bonus area with brutally difficult challenges

This product supports the following languages: English
70010000111316.intro: Melt a face, slap a bass or kiss a drum in this RPG about three idiot musicians. Praised for its refreshing take on the JRPG genre.
70010000111316.name: Deathbulge: Battle of the Bands

70010000118689.description:
Momento is a cozy room decorator with a twist: the objects you choose will alter the course of the story! Decorate your room, choose which items are important to you, and discover how these choices play out over the course of a lifetime.

Begin in childhood, picking out toys that represent your dreams for the future. Follow those dreams into adulthood, exploring wildly different settings and themes. Uncover stories of heartbreak, wonder and love, and learn the significance behind the sentimental treasures that follow you throughout. Pay close attention - some objects may be more than they seem at first glance.

Click your way through a delightfully tactile world, switching on lights, leafing through books, petting adorable animals, and more! Collect items and furniture in story mode to play with in the endless creative mode. At the end of it all you return to the very beginning, to discover new endings, fresh twists in the path, and explore an evolving story of love and loss.

Embark on a journey where the objects you choose to keep influence the life you lead.

Features:
• Decorative freedom: There’s no right or wrong way to arrange your space!
• Choices matter: Watch small decisions ripple over a lifetime!
• Explore freely: Search every nook and cranny of the level. There’s surprises behind every corner!
• Creative mode: Unlock items and furniture to decorate your own room in creative mode!
• Easter eggs: Solve puzzles to uncover special rewards.
• Gorgeous vibes: Immerse yourself in relaxing scenery and lovely music!
70010000118689.intro: Momento is a cozy room decorator with a twist: the objects you choose will alter the course of the story!
70010000118689.name: Momento

70010000107054.description:
When a boy’s father is suddenly slain by a terrifying lightning demon, he courageously sets out on a quest of vengeance. Take the role of this young hero as he learns to gather and wield powerful demon magic known as Clarity. Run, jump, air dash and swing your sword as you traverse 7 worlds in side-scrolling style, slaying lesser demon spawn and avoiding treacherous traps to reach the boss of each unique stage!

Clarity: The Seven Demons of Vanguardia is an action platforming adventure with a focus on thoughtful reward, all presented in hand-drawn HD style. Customize the experience with multiple difficulty settings. Choose whichever stage you want to tackle first but be mindful to collect demon swords from defeated bosses in an order that grants a strategic advantage against the next. Each demon has an elemental weakness to exploit! Use melee slashes from your swords or execute spells with your staff by consuming the Clarity you’ve claimed from fallen foes. Will you be prepared for the final showdown?

• Hunt menacing demons in the quest to avenge your father!
• Run, jump, slash and air dash as you traverse 7 worlds in side-scrolling style.
• Gather magical Clarity to wield special spells and skills!
• Tackle stages in any order to acquire powerful demon swords.
• Strategically exploit enemies’ elemental weaknesses!
70010000107054.intro: Slay demons to avenge your fallen father in side-scrolling action platforming style!
70010000107054.name: Clarity: The Seven Demons of Vanguardia

70010000127292.description: Grids of Thermometers delivers the relaxed fun of a pen-and-paper logic game right to your fingertips. In each level, you fill a grid of thermometers with mercury. Numbers on the grid edges tell you how many cells must be filled in each row and column.
70010000127292.intro: Try this game inspired by a pen-and-paper classic!
70010000127292.name: Grids of Thermometers

70010000113010.description:
A 2D pixel art roguelike space shooter with plugged resource management, procedural levels and challenging bosses! Hold the controls tight and do not get stranded in the void!

PLUG 'N' SHOOT

- Plug in to recharge your energy and manage your resources.
- Be Careful! Once plugged, you'll only be able to move within the range of your cable!
- Space is plunged into darkness, activate the spacesockets to clear a level and travel to the next sector.

FIGHT

- Choose between 10+ different ships with different gameplay modes!
- Blast your mega-laser!
- Form an army of rescued stranded ships that will fight alongside you!
- Destroy the stages and defeat a large variety of enemies!
- Encounter dangerous and challenging BOSSES after each galaxy in your quest.

SLOW DOWN TIME

Holding the breach, dodging enemy bullets, and piloting through narrow hallways shouldn't be a problem, BUT just in case...
- Your ship is equipped with a futuristic Slow-Mo System that you can use almost whenever you want!
- Luckily for you, it recharges by collecting energy from dead enemies!

UPGRADE

- Pick up BATTERIES and discover +250 combinations of bullet modifiers!
- Get CHIPS of temporary upgrades by destroying enemies!
- Choose between more than 40 upgrades for your ship.
- Optimize charge times, improve your firepower, get more cable length...
- Become invisible to enemies.

And more!
70010000113010.intro: Hyperwired is a roguelike top-down action shooter, where your spaceship has a plug hanging from it.
70010000113010.name: HYPERWIRED

70010000122818.description:
Get ready to use your ears! Time your button presses to the beat in this broad collection of rhythm games that are easy to learn and rewarding to master. Catch flying veggies, bounce fruit off your biceps, swing sledgehammers, and more as you focus on catchy original music—including tracks by renowned Japanese musician Tsunku♂. 

Boost frogs into the air, flap umbrellas, and so much more in over 80 rhythm games—and that’s just solo mode!

Cooperate and compete in over 30 rhythm games for up to four players

Gather up to four players* around a single system to slice arrows, pluck hair from onions, and more. Whether you’re striving to see who can be first to snatch the cake, or teaming up to save the prince with the power of tennis, these games are sure to test your ability to keep the beat.

Become a magician and use the power of rhythm to beat monsters in Beatspell

As you progress in the game, you'll gradually unlock Beatspell—a mode in which you combat monsters with rhythm-based spells, like fire and healing, by tapping buttons to the beat. What spells will strike a chord when you face down your foes?
70010000122818.intro: Tune in and groove to a collection of games that will challenge your rhythm
70010000122818.name: Rhythm Heaven™ Groove

70010000125188.description: Gather, control, and lead your army on the road to glory. No obstacle can stop you. Prepare for the final battle and defeat every opponent along the way. Lead the army with care - your soldiers believe in you!
70010000125188.intro: Gather and lead your army to the finish line! Face your enemies and win the battle!
70010000125188.name: The Boys Escape

70010000127537.description:
To resist the goblin invasion, the town’s lady lord and the shrine maiden joined forces to summon monsters. 
They kidnapped you and persuaded you to take on the job of raising monster eggs. As time passes, your relationship with them gradually grows closer... 
1. Draw Eggs: Obtain monster eggs of random rarity. 
2. Raise Eggs: Idle and wait for the eggs to grow. 
3. Sell Monsters: Sell the monsters after they mature. 
4. Collect: Complete 200 × 2 monster handbooks. 
5. Story: Events unlock as you continue playing. 
6. Music: Enjoy relaxing lo-fi music while idling.
(Supports Offline Idle)
70010000127537.intro: A relaxing idle collection game with beautiful girls (supports offline). You are an egg keeper helping the girls hatch monster eggs.  200 monster eggs + soothing lo-fi music♪
70010000127537.name: Lofi Witch Hatch

70010000116587.description:
William is a young writer in search of his first literary success. He travels to a distant abbey, shrouded in a vow of silence. Among thick stone walls and unspoken secrets, William slowly immerses himself into the life of the abbey and its silent inhabitants.

What begins as a search for inspiration soon turns mysterious, leading William to uncover not just a story to tell, but a secret that was never meant to be discovered.

Scholar Adventure: Mystery of Silence is a classic 90s-style point & click adventure featuring dark, detailed pixel art, environmental puzzles, and a deep narrative with touches of black humor.

Explore the abbey, solve mysteries using the items you find along the way, and uncover the secrets hidden within its silent walls.
70010000116587.name: Scholar Adventure: Mystery of Silence

70010000120237.description:
In the distant past, Edmund lived a quiet life with his father and his younger sister, Leofe. 

Edmund wanted nothing more than to protect his sister...

But, despite Edmund’s best efforts, their relationship crumbled.

Now, almost one thousand years in the future, Edmund has been reincarnated in the same sleepy English village of Fenchapel. 

He’s still grappling with painful memories of his younger sister, who perished centuries ago. 


Edmund’s life changes when he meets a smiley young man called Abel with a mischievous streak. He soon learns that there’s more to Abel than meets the eye, and he begins to see in his new companion in a new light.


Features
* Slice of life boys love visual novel
* Timeless romance story with 85,000 words
* Original art and music
* A linear story with no choices or branches
* A happy ending
* Two pretty boys to stare at
70010000120237.intro: A sweet slice of life visual novel
70010000120237.name: In Fair Spirits

70010000123590.description: Join Kitsune, a curious fox spirit, and the powerful deity Nyaneko on a serene quest across enchanted realms. From the rhythmic rails of the Water Train Station to the neon glow of the Mushroom Council, every map is a living illustration teeming with secrets. Solve gentle puzzles, meet quirky Yokai, and uncover the stories hidden in the details.
70010000123590.intro: Step into a hand-drawn world of whimsy in Lost Little Things, a cozy hidden object adventure for the soul.
70010000123590.name: Lost Little Things

70010000124309.description:
Park with precision and complete a wide range of driving challenges in tight and controlled environments. In Parking Simulator: Retro Car Driving, your main objective is to move your car carefully and park it correctly within the marked zone while avoiding collisions and staying within the level conditions.

Each level presents a different parking scenario where you must control your speed, adjust your steering, and use both forward and reverse to align your vehicle perfectly. You’ll need to pay attention to distance, angle, and positioning, especially in narrow spaces where even a small mistake can fail the attempt.

The game gradually increases in difficulty, starting with simple parking tasks and moving toward more complex challenges. As you progress, you’ll face tighter layouts, limited visibility, sharper turns, and obstacles placed in critical positions. Some levels require precise timing and multiple adjustments before reaching the final position.
You will drive through various environments such as open parking areas and underground garages. Each location introduces new challenges and forces you to adapt your driving approach.

The gameplay is built around smooth and responsive controls, allowing you to focus on accuracy and control rather than speed. Camera positioning helps you better understand the space around your car, making it easier to plan your moves and avoid obstacles.

Success depends on patience, precision, and the ability to stay focused in every situation.
Take your time, make every move count, and master the art of parking.
70010000124309.name: Parking Simulator: Retro Car Driving

70010000109827.description:
Experience life as a vampire in a magical town full of werewolves, witches, mermaids, and more! In this heart-warming, supernatural life-sim, you will raise mystical crops, learn spell-casting and potion-making, and befriend – or even romance – the locals. And at the same time, show your skeptical father that a life of compassion is possible – even for the undead.

Settle down in your family’s abandoned homestead and make it your own. Build your farm with magic crops and livestock, customize your cottage with gothic style, and make friends with other creatures of the night. Embrace immortality and unlock ancient abilities, all in the name of a more bountiful harvest. Unravel the mysteries of the seven families that inhabit Moonlight Peaks and bring a bit of light back to this spooky settlement. Just remember to be back in your coffin before the sun comes up!

Key Features
■Uncover a Sweet and Spooky Journey
Customize your perfect vampire persona and build relationships with the people of Moonlight Peaks to learn more about the town’s history. Uncover the secrets of the seven families who dwell there – and maybe even find your “tomb” love from any of the two dozen romanceable characters in the process.

■Build Your Dream Gothic Farmstead
Design your cozy gothic homestead, turning a forgotten farm into the ideal sanctuary. Obtain new tools and develop your property to grow even more enchanted crops and raise magical livestock.

■Harness Magical Powers
Embrace your supernatural lineage! Shapeshift into other forms to explore all the town has to offer, and study witchcraft to learn spells that will help you on the farm or when gathering resources. 

■Delight in Dark Diversions
Beyond the farm, you’ll be able to enjoy fishing, foraging, and potion-crafting, along with activities like embroidering, flower arranging, and more. You can even collect cards for the town’s favorite game, Nokturna, to play against other residents.
70010000109827.intro: Welcome to your new vampiric life in the magical town of Moonlight Peaks!
70010000109827.name: Moonlight Peaks

70010000120620.description:
The city has collapsed. Survival is your only objective.
In Rage District - Humanity Armageddon, you step into a broken urban world where chaos has taken control and every street hides danger. Explore abandoned districts, uncover hidden truths, and fight to stay alive in a city consumed by fear and violence.

Move through different sectors filled with ruined buildings, industrial zones, and hidden facilities. Search for resources, gather intel, and uncover what led to the collapse of the city. Every location tells a piece of the story, pushing you deeper into the unknown.

Engage in intense top-down combat using a variety of weapons while managing limited resources. Choose when to fight and when to avoid danger, as every encounter can change your chances of survival. Careful planning and awareness are key in every situation.

Destroy key locations, weaken enemy control, and trigger high-risk encounters against powerful enemies guarding critical areas. Progress is driven by exploration, decisions, and how far you’re willing to go to uncover the truth .

Key Features:
- Top-down survival action gameplay
- Open-ended exploration across multiple districts
- Resource management and tactical decision-making
- Variety of weapons and combat styles
- Intel collection and story discovery
- High-risk encounters and boss fights

Stay alert, explore every corner, and survive the chaos.
In Rage District - Humanity Armageddon, every decision shapes your path.
70010000120620.intro: A broken city where every decision shapes your survival
70010000120620.name: Rage District - Humanity Armageddon

70010000126913.description:
Experience life as a vampire in a magical town full of werewolves, witches, mermaids, and more! In this heart-warming, supernatural life-sim, you will raise mystical crops, learn spell-casting and potion-making, and befriend – or even romance – the locals. And at the same time, show your skeptical father that a life of compassion is possible – even for the undead.

70010000126913.intro: Welcome to your new vampiric life in the magical town of Moonlight Peaks!
70010000126913.name: Moonlight Peaks – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition

70050000073617.description: When you purchase this pack, it will upgrade the Nintendo Switch™ version of Moonlight Peaks to Moonlight Peaks – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition.
70050000073617.intro: Welcome to your new vampiric life in the magical town of Moonlight Peaks!
70050000073617.name: Moonlight Peaks – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70010000122161.description:
Create the workspace of your dreams in My Cozy Workspace - a relaxing simulator where creativity, comfort, and productivity come together. Design and customize rooms by placing furniture, organizing accessories, decorating shelves, and building a cozy atmosphere that feels uniquely yours.

Arrange desks, plants, books, lights, and dozens of decorative items while transforming small empty spaces into inspiring work, whether you prefer a minimalist office, a colorful creative studio, or a warm workspace corner.

Take your time, experiment with different layouts, and enjoy a calm and satisfying experience focused on creativity and relaxation.
70010000122161.intro: Build the workspace you’ve always dreamed of!
70010000122161.name: My Cozy Workspace

70010000124875.description: New gameplay of the classic snake game. Collect the color you need to complete the levels. Pick up boosts to make things easier. Change skins to make your snake look stylish and unique!
70010000124875.intro: A mix of Snakes and Colors for an exciting gameplay experience!
70010000124875.name: Color Snake

70010000091122.description:
Dead Estate is a gory, fast-paced, challenging, roguelike shooter with a heavy emphasis on Halloween and other horror influences. Ascend the floors of a monster-filled mansion with 10 unique characters, collecting loads of items and weapons, tackle grueling challenges, and discover secrets and unlockables along the way!

Beware of the lurking threats on every floor -- some are especially persistent...

HIGH REPLAYABILITY!

- 10 playable characters, each with distinct playstyles and 4 Costumes each
- 150 weapons and 300 items to make each run unique
- Explore the vast complexity of the Estate - discovering alternate floors & floor variants
- An isometric style with compact rooms designed for tense, close-quarters combat
- Try a looped run, or varying difficulty levels to push your skills
- Blessing & Curse run modifiers to maximize replayability
- 20 custom Challenge Runs
- A bounty of secrets to be discovered, and many more to be unlocked

ASSIGNMENT ANYA

An entirely separate campaign inspired by classic survival horror games, set prior to the events of the main game. Play as Anya, a fledgling actress who finds herself helplessly lost in the mansion after her film crew is attacked by the undead.

Abandoned by her leading man and left alone with nothing but a mask to disguise herself with, Anya must escape the increasingly warped and deadly estate all on her own.
70010000091122.name: Dead Estate

70010000110953.description:
Digimon Story Time Stranger is an RPG with monster-taming elements that explores the deep bond between humans and Digimon in an epic story that unravels the mystery of the world’s collapse.

Embark on an adventure that spans across the human world and Digital World, collecting and raising a diverse array of Digimon to fight in turn-based battles.

An Epic Story of Connection
Tokyo, Japan – An agent of a secret organization encounters an unknown creature shortly before a city-leveling explosion. They then reawaken eight years in the past...
Take on a mission to uncover the mystery of the world’s collapse, where chance encounters with unique characters will shape your journey across time and parallel worlds - and change fate itself.

Adventure Between Worlds and Time
Journey between the parallel human world and the Digital World: Iliad where Digimon reside. Explore the Digital World and its intricately detailed realms and discover all of its secrets.

Strategic Turn-Based Battles
Enjoy dynamic turn-based combat that combines strategic elements with evolved battle components. More than 450 Digimon and deep customization options provide limitless ways to approach the challenges of battle and reveal the strength of the bonds formed with your Digimon.

*This product is the Standard Edition. A Deluxe Edition and Ultimate Edition are also available. Please be careful of duplicate purchases.

REGARDING THE DEMO
Get a glimpse of the story with the opening chapter of Digimon Story Time Stranger in this demo. Save data from this demo can also be transferred to the full version of the game.

Complete the demo and gain access to the Central Town - Adventure Trial mode to explore select areas and dungeons of the Digital World: Iliad.

*Central Town - Adventure Trial data cannot be transferred to the full version of the game.
70010000110953.name: Digimon Story Time Stranger

70050000068960.description:
Receive the Pre-Order Bonus Pack with trainable Digimon, usable items, and a costume.

Pre-Order Bonus Pack includes:
• Trainable Digimon: Agumon (Black) & Gabumon (Black)
• Costume Uniform of a Certain School
- Protagonist (Dan Yuki) Costume Uniform of a Certain School
- Protagonist (Kanan Yuki) Costume Uniform of a Certain School
• Adventure Item Set
- Consumables: Medical Spray DX x3

Digimon Story Time Stranger is an RPG with monster-taming elements that explores the deep bond between humans and Digimon in an epic story that unravels the mystery of the world’s collapse.

Embark on an adventure that spans across the human world and Digital World, collecting and raising a diverse array of Digimon to fight in turn-based battles.

An Epic Story of Connection
Tokyo, Japan – An agent of a secret organization encounters an unknown creature shortly before a city-leveling explosion. They then reawaken eight years in the past...
Take on a mission to uncover the mystery of the world’s collapse, where chance encounters with unique characters will shape your journey across time and parallel worlds - and change fate itself.

Adventure Between Worlds and Time
Journey between the parallel human world and the Digital World: Iliad where Digimon reside. Explore the Digital World and its intricately detailed realms and discover all of its secrets.

Strategic Turn-Based Battles
Enjoy dynamic turn-based combat that combines strategic elements with evolved battle components. More than 450 Digimon and deep customization options provide limitless ways to approach the challenges of battle and reveal the strength of the bonds formed with your Digimon.

*This product is the Deluxe Edition. A Standard Edition and Ultimate Edition are also available. Please be careful of duplicate purchases.
*Costumes may not be reflected in some cutscenes.
*The DLC included in the Season Pass will be distributed by September 30, 2026.

70010000060573.description:
Step into a future where happiness is curated by artificial intelligence, in this gentle-paced puzzle adventure.

The Utopia Project was created in the interest of maximizing human happiness and comfort. As the newest residential Facilitator at D-topia, your role is to resolve issues around the residential community. Tackle fun logic-based puzzles to resolve mechanical issues and keep the facilities running smoothly and meet the many vibrant residents, each with their own unique story and personal struggle.

But what happens when problems go beyond the mechanical? How will your choices impact the wellbeing of the residents, and the future of humanity? In a world of curated happiness, what does it mean to find purpose?

Features:
* A Gentle-Paced, Reflective Adventure: Unwind in a calm, yet thought-provoking journey to discover what happiness truly means. 

* Clever, Integrated Puzzles: Tackle satisfying logic puzzles that connect to the heart of this gentle-paced adventure.

* Meet D-topia’s Residents: Gain their trust, discover their stories, and shape their futures in unexpected ways.

* Your Choices Matter: Guide this artificial intelligence-managed utopia toward joy or despair through your decisions. 

* Step Into Two Worlds: Move between the bright, public reality and the hidden “Block Side” to fix glitches and uncover secrets.
70010000060573.name: D-topia

70010000106495.description:
Absorb & Transform!

Teeto’s got a talent for absorbing all sorts of objects - and turning them into wild new forms! With Nory’s Vionite-powered backpack, they unlock unique abilities to outsmart enemies, solve puzzles, and discover hidden secrets. Mix it up, get creative, and see what strange new powers you’ll unleash!

Team up Together!

Life’s better with a buddy - and so is saving the world! Grab a friend and dive into split-screen co-op, where you’ll absorb, transform, and explore together. Solve puzzles, help each other out, and take on this wild adventure side by side!

Chaos Corruption!

Chaos is spreading, and the shadow creatures are behind it! Teeto and Nory must team up, using their unique powers to stop the mayhem, restore balance, and keep the world from tipping into complete disorder!

Missing Michaels!

It started with one Michael - Nory’s first experiment. But Michael couldn’t stay simple… he split into two, then four, then eight! Now there are too many Michaels for anyone to handle. Track them down, rescue them, and bring the tiny mischief-makers home!

Lend a Hand, Get a Hand!

Teeto and Nory aren’t the only ones in need of help. Along the way, you’ll meet a colourful cast of quirky characters, each with their own oddball dilemmas. Lend them a hand, and they might just return the favour with useful items, hidden secrets, or unexpected abilities.

Dress The Part

Teeto can unlock a variety of fun and stylish costumes, from the effortlessly cool to the absolutely ridiculous. Saving the world is important - but who says you can’t look fashionable while doing it?
70010000106495.intro: Explore a world of mayhem and Michaels! Join Teeto the blob and Nory the bunny in this 3D adventure platformer to stop the shadow corruption from spreading.
70010000106495.name: Teeto

70010000120332.description:
All those who are lost deserve kindness. Help cute, ghostly bears find peace in this relaxing sequel to the beloved life-sim game where kindness rules and new crafting, building, and camping island adventures await.

Attention, Spirit Scouts! Something spooky is afoot: A bus crash has left you stranded alone on a mysterious (yet delightfully cute) island. Explore the unique island, meet and befriend cute, ghostly spirit bears who need your help to remember their pasts and find peace. Customize a bustling, beautiful campsite — crafting, decorating, and building furniture to bring life and color back to this cute island — and hopefully reunite with your lost scout troop as you gradually repair your bus.

YOUR RELAXING ISLAND OASIS AT THE END OF A STRESSFUL DAY

Whether you're new to the "Cozy Grove" community or a devoted fan, this relaxing follow-up to the beloved life-sim adventure offers something for everyone. This edition of "Cozy Grove" is cuter and cozier than ever, introducing a fresh cast of quirky characters, new animal companions, a new setting and added gameplay features that offer endless ways to unwind at the end of a stressful day. So immerse yourself in a unique, relaxing watercolor art style filled with stunning details and activities to explore. Drop in daily for crafting, decorating, fishing and cooking fun, or embark on new quests to stay busy. Lead with kindness and achieve your camping dreams — customize the cute, spooky island you've always wanted.

FIND NEW FOREVER FRIENDS AND CUTE ANIMAL COMPANIONS

Alongside familiar faces like Flamey and Mr. Kit, new spirit bears are waiting to bond with you and share their backstories. New animal companions are also on the island to offer support and relaxing comfort — now you can pet a dog (!) or have a snail help lighten your load.

NEW SPOOKY MYSTERIES TO INVESTIGATE

Uncover the secrets of the interconnected islands you've landed on as you complete daily quests. As you progress with patience and diligence, you may unlock new areas to explore. Visit dedicated stations for different activities and light up lamps to find bountiful new spots for foraging and mining.

CUSTOMIZE YOUR ISLAND WHILE CRAFTING, DECORATING AND CAMPING

Just because you're living on a haunted island doesn't mean you can't get comfortable! Immerse yourself in crafting and decorating activities, or collect furniture to make the island your own. Plant flowers and fruit trees to harvest, raise ghostly animals and attract pets to your house. And if things start to feel ho-hum, give yourself a custom head-to-toe makeover.

A POSITIVE, HEARTENING DAILY RITUAL

This life-sim game unfolds in sync with real-world time, bringing cute surprises and spooky seasons on the island. If you finish the day's quests, you can cook, craft, collect shells, catch bugs, go fishing, skip rocks or even spruce things up with a new power-washing tool. Rake in rewards as you add to your collection of cute items and earn merit badges for all your accomplishments. A Spirit Scout's work is never done!

Created with love by Spry Fox
70010000120332.intro: All those who are lost deserve kindness.
70010000120332.name: Cozy Grove: Camp Spirit

70010000066160.description:
Step into the role of a truly hands-on mayor and shape your town from the ground up.

Plan neighbourhoods, optimise logistics networks, and help your community grow - all while juggling workers, infrastructure, suspiciously large tools, visiting robots, aliens & dinosaurs, and the general day-to-day chaos of building your dream town.

And when mayoral duties get a little much, take a break with a spot of fishing, have a spin on the Go-Kart track, or even high-five a cow. 

Play solo for perfect control, or bring friends for co-op mayhem.

Grow Your Town

Lay down your streets, then place businesses, homes, and services where they’ll thrive. Welcome tourists, keep them happy, and give them plenty of reasons to stick around and make your town their home. Hire workers, keep shops stocked, and make sure the money keeps flowing, then upgrade, expand, and unlock new ways to help your town flourish. 

Optimise, Automate, Prosper

Tailor each business, industry zone and building configuration to suit your wants and needs. Assign workers, optimise supply chains, set-up logistics networks and watch your systems flourish. Will you let automation do the heavy lifting, or will you be the Mayor of Micromanagement? 

Bring The Style

As mayor, style starts at home, but it doesn't stop there. Dive into immersive house customisation with full 360° placement and a handy colour picker, then take that creative control across your town with recoloured buildings, and plenty of ways to make every street, shop, and neighbourhood feel uniquely yours. Need a new look while you work? Step into the Change-O-Tron and emerge as the mayor you were always meant to be. Your town. Your mayor. Your style.

Chaotic Co-Op

Team-up with up with another mayor, in either local and online play for just the right amount of teamwork and chaos. Build together, manage together, panic together, and discover how quickly a carefully planned town can go sideways when everyone has a different idea of ‘helping’.
70010000066160.intro: Time to roll up your sleeves, Mayor!
70010000066160.name: Go-Go Town!

70010000100995.description:
A hidden classic that fuses board and card games, Culdcept features a unique, innovative system that has captivated fans since its debut. Players become Cepters, wielding cards in intense battles where luck and strategy collide. After ten years, a brand-new story begins once again.

●What is Culdcept?
It is a game where you move across the board, claim territories, and build strategies using cards.
Use summons and magic to fight your way to victory.

●Story
Bavrashka, a continent created by the gods.
At its center lies the Royal Cept Academy, an insitute where Cepters are trained to wield the power of stone tablets known as "Culds," fragments of the Culdcept.
Kamur, who transferred to the Cept Academy, has his abilities recognized and is selected for the Royal Cepter Guard Regiment.
Amid battles that threaten the continent, the power of a Cepter begins to awaken.

●Game System
Move with dice and battle with cards—
This is a board game where victory hangs on a mix of luck and strategy.
Experience a more accessible evolution of Culdcept that stays true to the series’ charm.

●Cards
Over 400 cards with all-new visuals.
Combine all kinds of cards to win through the power of your own tactics.

・Creature Cards
These are cards that allow you to summon creatures.
They can help you gain more domains, or take over enemy domains.
There are five elements, and each card has different abilities.

・Item Cards
Item cards support your creatures in battle.
And that's not to say they simply help creatures attack and defend better.
Using the special abilities of items can help you snatch victory from the jaws of defeat!

・Spell Cards
Spell cards can help you build momentum, or put your opponents in a difficult position.
Use them right and you can even turn the tides of the game in the blink of an eye.
Suffice to say, these cards are essential to winning.
70010000100995.intro: Led by dice. Ruled by cards
70010000100995.name: Culdcept BEGINS

70010000105215.description:
Explore the depths of this massive dungeon with your adorable companion Una in this exciting  ROGUE-like deck-building adventure!
Game feature:
• Dynamic Dungeon Layout
Fight through randomly-generated monster-filled dungeons and encounter merchants, treasures and story events. You can only see three levels down, so choose wisely as you push deeper into the dungeon.

• Titillating Card Battles
Build the most powerful deck out of over 50 different cards and 20 different runes and use it to overwhelm your enemies! 

• Random Treasure
Obtain random treasures to upgrade Una's abilities. Put together the strongest combination and synergize it with your deck to deal ungodly amounts of damage!

• An Exciting Story with Multiple Endings
Make choices and experience different endings in this exciting adventure story! Unlock different side stories to trigger various card enchantments. Some enchantments might come in handy, while others might hurt you!
70010000105215.intro: Build your deck and take Una on an epic dungeon adventure!
70010000105215.name: Take Me To The Dungeon!!

70010000120066.description:
Punch and dodge* to the beat in the latest entry of the Fitness Boxing series, now with performance enhancements and additional content for the Nintendo Switch™ 2 system! Pair up with your choice of nine fully voiced virtual instructors with customizable outfits and hairstyles—and then get your groove on in 30 instrumental songs, some of which are inspired by catchy pop tunes.

Jump into a single Quick Workout, or build an exercise routine that fits your life. Additions to the series include Mitt Drills to practice combos with your instructor and Sit Fit Boxing to work up a sweat without leaving your seat. Whether you’re after a serious burn or just a bit of stretching, the intensity of your workout is up to you!

The Nintendo Switch 2 Edition has a faster frame rate and enhanced resolution. It also adds an Advanced Scoring Mode that takes the timing of your hits into account, a Boost Up feature that gradually increases the speed of your workout with each round, and CameraPlay** support so you can see your movements on screen.

Invite a friend to join your workout via GameShare

If you have the Fitness Boxing 3: Your Personal Trainer – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition game, you can share the game with anyone who has a Nintendo Switch or Nintendo Switch 2 system using GameShare*** via local wireless to work out side by side.

Already have Fitness Boxing 3: Your Personal Trainer for Nintendo Switch? Purchase the upgrade pack!   

If you already have the game for Nintendo Switch, you can purchase the upgrade pack**** separately to play this version on Nintendo Switch 2.
70010000120066.intro: A workout that fits your lifestyle—now enhanced for the Nintendo Switch 2 system!
70010000120066.name: Fitness Boxing 3: Your Personal Trainer – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition

70010000120265.description:
Streetdog BMX is an action sports game where you ride through expansive maps sending extreme tricks, getting technical on the rails, and feeling the flow.

Customize your bike and rider before hitting the streets to explore six maps packed with wallrides, gaps, bowls, ramps and rails. Uncover new spots, complete handcrafted challenges, and link up your combos!


Your Bike, Your Rules

Focus on high scores and big air, or flow through levels at your own pace. Streetdog BMX accommodates all kinds of riders and play styles. Your lines can be as complex or as simple as you want them to be. Just keep in mind, the bigger the combo... the harder you fall.


Own the Streets

Unleash your creativity. Fakie, manual, icepick or wallride your way through over 270 sick challenges. From barspin to backflip, to crooked grind to crankflip - you’ll have a huge selection of tricks and stunts to use when you send it.


Customization Galore

With dozens of color and outfit options, you can customize your bike and rider the way you want. Play around with options for clothes, shoes, hair, tattoos and more. Build the BMX bike of your dreams with plenty of customizable options ranging from the frame down to the chainring.


BMX for Life

As a longtime BMX rider, I've been pouring my passion for the sport into games like Trail Boss BMX and the Pumped BMX series for years. Streetdog BMX is the action sports game I've always wanted to make and is the next step in combining my love of making games and getting on the bike.
70010000120265.intro: Get ready for massive tricks, high scores, and gnarly slams.
70010000120265.name: Streetdog BMX

70010000121296.description:
Take control of the tough hero Inguz and get ready to run, jump, and shoot your way through a kingdom of crazy and hostile toys. With vibrant and detailed pixel art, you’ll face off against the army of the villain Scrubby using upgradeable weapons and devastating bombs.

Highlights:
Portable Action: Perfect for quick matches or intense marathons.
Precision Mechanics: Jump between platforms, dodge traps, and use the environment to your advantage.
Support Tools: Use Rewind to go back in time after a mistake and Save State to never lose your progress.
Extra Content: Explore the gallery of original artwork and listen to the classic soundtrack on the Jukebox.
70010000121296.intro: Classic run-and-gun action in an explosive arcade adventure!
70010000121296.name: Biomechanical Toy (QUByte Classics)

70010000124869.description: Command and control your own horde of zombies to defeat your opponents and become the greatest in the arenas. Collect weak humans and turn them into your weapons. The larger your undead army, the greater your chances of domination.
70010000124869.intro: Lead your undead legion to the world domination!
70010000124869.name: Zombie Legion

70010000128076.description:
Step into the role of a truly hands-on mayor and shape your town from the ground up.

Plan neighbourhoods, optimise logistics networks, and help your community grow - all while juggling workers, infrastructure, suspiciously large tools, visiting robots, aliens & dinosaurs, and the general day-to-day chaos of building your dream town.

And when mayoral duties get a little much, take a break with a spot of fishing, have a spin on the Go-Kart track, or even high-five a cow. 

Play solo for perfect control, or bring friends for co-op mayhem.

Grow Your Town

Lay down your streets, then place businesses, homes, and services where they’ll thrive. Welcome tourists, keep them happy, and give them plenty of reasons to stick around and make your town their home. Hire workers, keep shops stocked, and make sure the money keeps flowing, then upgrade, expand, and unlock new ways to help your town flourish. 

Optimise, Automate, Prosper

Tailor each business, industry zone and building configuration to suit your wants and needs. Assign workers, optimise supply chains, set-up logistics networks and watch your systems flourish. Will you let automation do the heavy lifting, or will you be the Mayor of Micromanagement? 

Bring The Style

As mayor, style starts at home, but it doesn't stop there. Dive into immersive house customisation with full 360° placement and a handy colour picker, then take that creative control across your town with recoloured buildings, and plenty of ways to make every street, shop, and neighbourhood feel uniquely yours. Need a new look while you work? Step into the Change-O-Tron and emerge as the mayor you were always meant to be. Your town. Your mayor. Your style.

Chaotic Co-Op

Team-up with up with another mayor, in either local and online play for just the right amount of teamwork and chaos. Build together, manage together, panic together, and discover how quickly a carefully planned town can go sideways when everyone has a different idea of ‘helping’.
70010000128076.intro: Time to roll up your sleeves, Mayor!
70010000128076.name: Go-Go Town! – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

70050000068870.description: This is a pass for upgrading the Nintendo Switch™ software “Culdcept BEGINS” to “Culdcept BEGINS Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition.”
70050000068870.intro: Led by dice. Ruled by cards
70050000068870.name: Culdcept BEGINS Upgrade Pack

70050000073921.description:
Enhance your Fitness Boxing experience with this upgrade pack*. Fitness Boxing 3: Your Personal Trainer – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition features a faster frame rate, increased resolution, and some additional content!

Push your training to the next level with an Advanced Scoring Mode that takes the timing of your hits into account, or a Boost Up feature that gradually increases the speed of your workout with each round. You can also see your movements on screen with the added CameraPlay** support.

Invite a friend to join your workout via GameShare

If you have upgraded to the Fitness Boxing 3: Your Personal Trainer – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition game, you can share the game with anyone who has a Nintendo Switch or Nintendo Switch 2 system using GameShare*** via local wireless to work out side by side.
70050000073921.intro: Upgrade your workout for the Nintendo Switch 2 system
70050000073921.name: Fitness Boxing 3: Your Personal Trainer – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70010000122748.description:
In a world where the undead have consumed the frontier, survival is the only law left. Step into the boots of a fearless bounty hunter and fight through waves of zombies across cursed towns, abandoned mines, and forgotten wilderness. Unlock powerful survivors, devastating weapons, and loyal companions as you carve your path through the apocalypse.  

- Begin your journey as a lone gunslinger and unlock unique playable characters, each with their own abilities and playstyles.

- Create hundreds of powerful build combinations using a perk system that enhances weapons, triggers explosions, and unleashes elemental powers such as lightning, fire, and ice.

- Fight alongside loyal companions with unique abilities. Some pets strengthen your attacks and skills, while others bring powerful combat abilities of their own.

- Survive against massive zombie hordes, deadly elite enemies, and terrifying bosses that will challenge your reflexes, positioning, and strategy.

- Explore diverse locations ranging from abandoned western towns and graveyards to dark mines, cursed forests, and forgotten frontier outposts. Every location introduces new dangers, secrets, and gameplay opportunities.

- Wield a massive arsenal of weapons, from classic revolvers and lever-action rifles to experimental creations like Tesla gun and explosive heavy weaponry.

- Gather resources and experience during every run to upgrade your characters, pets, weapons, and abilities, allowing you to take on increasingly dangerous enemies.

- Immerse yourself in stylized visuals and a soundtrack inspired by the brutal atmosphere of a zombie-infested Wild West.

- Complete missions to unlock locations and gameplay modifiers.
70010000122748.intro: Survive the frontier. Hunt the undead.
70010000122748.name: Wild West Survivors

70010000117929.description:
Overview

Rei, the main character, is a human spirit bound with the challenging duty of defeating mystical entities of nature, the Kami, to obtain their power.

You are free to pick your fights against the Kami in any order. The game features a dynamic difficulty system where each enemy strength is defined by the player’s chosen path. This means that the very same Kami fought at the very beginning could also be the final boss in a different route. Hope to never leave the one you struggle most to fight last!

Combat Features

Besides sword attacks, dodges, head stomps and other basic abilities, Rei will learn a completely new skill for each defeated Kami. Those will provide further depth to your combat arsenal, be it a stronger dash, a weapon that can execute enemies, the ability to heal and many more! 

Player choice is the ultimate power. Taking into account the vastly distinct enemies’ patterns and unique skills granted upon each victory, you will be able to decide how to approach every challenge. It won’t be easy either way, but you can always go back and try something different.

Beyond the Brawl

Gurei is a game about fighting strong enemies, but that’s not all. The Kami inhabit a surreal castle located between the human and spirit worlds. After each victory, Rei comes closer to the realm of spirits, starting to encounter peculiar characters from Japanese mythology. These creatures will add novelty and strangeness to your journey, providing commentary, unique animations, side objectives and obscure secrets.

Unlikely “Friends”

You will get to know the different Kami quite well. When Rei defeats them, she absorbs their power – and their personality. The defeated Kami will be carried around wherever Rei goes, and they’ll surely have stuff to talk about. Sometimes their remarks will be useful information that builds the player’s understanding of the lore and the game mechanics, but sometimes they will be... not so helpful, to put it briefly. Good luck!
70010000117929.intro: An unforgiving game with precise combat. Fight challenging bosses in any order, acquire their unique powers and succeed in your own terms.
70010000117929.name: Gurei

70010000124881.description: A fast-paced racing game where you can test your skills and see how you perform on the track. You have to be really fast and make decisions in milliseconds. Avoid all the obstacles and become number one! Customize your Cubics to win in style!
70010000124881.intro: You can't imagine how fast Cubics can be! Try them out and test your skills.
70010000124881.name: Cubic Riders

70010000096976.description:
Welcome to Kusan: City of Wolves, a brutal top-down shooter set in a neon-drenched urban jungle consumed by violence and corruption.

Kusan delivers hardcore action where one mistake means death. Master gunplay, perfect your movement, survive the streets and combat arenas ruled by furious kingpins that demand speed, precision and flawless execution. Every moment of action is intensified by Korean hip-hop heavyweight Loptimist’s adrenaline-fuelled soundtrack drenched with head-bopping loops and deep 808s pushing you forward without mercy.

You play as Jin, a skilled ex-soldier turned gun-for-hire, living in the heart of a city where the line between predator and prey has already been crossed. This isn’t just another job though, a mysterious girl with immense but uncontrollable power is linked to a violent conspiracy that threatens to shift the balance of power. As chaos erupts, Jin must save the girl, confront his past and the betrayal of a commander he once trusted without question.

Everyone in Kusan wants something and nobody plays fair.

For Jin, there is only one way forward: flawless planning, ruthless execution and saving the girl from criminals while relying only on his wit and unrelenting will to survive the battlefield.

With the whole city at stake, Jin knows it is time to not only clean-house but restore balance.

Dive into Kusan: City of Wolves and descend into a city on the edge. It's more than just a fight, you are the last line between order and oblivion.
70010000096976.intro: A high-octane hardcore top-down shooter set in a brutal urban jungle.
70010000096976.name: Kusan: City of Wolves

70010000118285.description:
Take mass destruction anywhere with Mechaconda! In this frantic arcade experience, you control a bio-mechanical weapon that grows in real-time. Maneuver your long body through dangerous arenas, collecting upgrade cards to install destructive weapons on every new segment.

With optimized controls for handheld mode, Mechaconda demands quick reflexes: the larger you get, the greater your firepower, but also the bigger the target for enemies. Choose your strategy from over 30 ability cards, defeat Dr. EVIL’s colossal bosses, and dominate the arena in this addictive blend of action and evolutionary survival!
70010000118285.intro: The classic “eat-and-grow” is now a weapon of mass destruction!
70010000118285.name: Mechaconda

70010000122691.description:
Lost in a sea of clouds, entire civilizations rest on the backs of Titans. As the giant beasts march toward death, the last hope is a scavenger named Rex—and Pyra, a living weapon known as a Blade. Command a group of Blades and lead them to countless strategic victories as you search for the fabled paradise Pyra calls home. This journey has been enhanced with 4K* resolution in TV mode, and full HD in handheld mode, at 60 frames per second—and with smoother and sharper cutscenes.

Discover a new rare Blade—and control your Blades to fight in mercenary squad battles

Not only is there an additional Blade out there for you to find—along with a quest to complete—but you can directly command your Blades in a new action battle mode! 

Unlock new equipment designs for Pyra and Mythra

Customize the look of Pyra and Mythra with new equipment designs exclusive to this Nintendo Switch 2 Edition game.

Already have Xenoblade Chronicles™ 2 for Nintendo Switch? Purchase the upgrade pack!   

If you already have the game for Nintendo Switch, you can purchase the upgrade pack** separately to play this version on Nintendo Switch 2.
70010000122691.intro: Lead Rex, Pyra, and the world to refuge in an adventure enhanced for the Nintendo Switch™ 2 system!
70010000122691.name: Xenoblade Chronicles™ 2 – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition

70050000070554.description:
Solid Ice and Terror

Escape the bitter cold outside. Screams echo across the ice, celebrating victories and championships of years past.

A massive industrial hockey arena has been abandoned for years. The lights flicker over empty stands and scarred ice. Mortals enter believing their greatest enemy is the polar vortex, however outside something far worse stalks the rink tonight. What looks cute can be just as terrifying. The officials are watching from beyond.

In Canada, hockey is life—even in the afterlife. Something far worse than the cold stalks the rink on this winter evening. The rules of the natural and the supernatural can change without warning. Some will cry for decades. Others are haunted forever.

Introducing a new level set in an industrial Canadian hockey arena somewhere in Canada. We’ll give you 514 guesses where. Every whistle cuts through the darkness, and every decision feels final.

Beware the supernatural official, Jacques Rougeau, who’s on the job.
“Justice isn’t fair. I don’t care if you get screwed over… bon!”
70050000070554.name: Solid Ice and Terror

The Nintendo Switch 2 Edition of this game features improved visuals, with 4K* resolution in TV mode and full HD in handheld mode at 60 frames per second, as well as smoother and sharper cutscenes. It also includes some additional gameplay content!

Discover a new rare Blade—and control your Blades to fight in mercenary squad battles

Unlock new equipment designs for Pyra and Mythra

Customize the look of Pyra and Mythra with new equipment designs exclusive to this Nintendo Switch 2 Edition game.
